{{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "Burial Facility"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones[[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site |name=Wakakodama Kofun Cluster |image=[[File:Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda), entrance.JPG|280px]]
Entrance to the stone chamber of {{ill|Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)}} |location={{ill|Gyōda|ja|行田市}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}} |coordinates={{Coord|36|08|34.3|N|139|29|12.6|E|region:JP-08_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=Wakakodama Kofun Cluster}} |map_size=3 {{ill|zenpokoenfun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun}} (keyhole-shaped kofun), 8 {{ill|empun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun}} (round kofun), and {{ill|hōfun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun}} (square kofun) |built= |Burial Facilities={{ill|Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber}} and others |Interred_individual=Unknown |burial goods= |other_designation={{ill|Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)}} and {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)}} (Prefectural Designation) |map={{location map|Japan Saitama|label=Wakakodama
Kofun Cluster|lat_deg=36|lat_min=08|lat_sec=34.3|lon_deg=139|lon_min=29|lon_sec=12.6|mark=|marksize=8|float=center|border=none|position=bottom|width=200|caption=location in Saitama Prefecture}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|36|08|34.3|N|139|29|12.6|E}}}} }} '''Wakakodama Kofun Cluster''' (若小玉古墳群, Wakakodama Kofun Cluster) is a group of {{ill|kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun}} (ancient Kofuns) located in {{ill|Gyōda|ja|行田市}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}}, Japan. == Overview == As of the early {{ill|Shōwa period|ja|昭和時代}}, the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster consisted of three keyhole-shaped tombs ({{ill|zenpokoenfun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun}}), eight round tombs ({{ill|empun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun}}), and several square tombs ({{ill|hōfun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun}}), including prominent examples such as Atagoyama Kofun and Kojinyama Kofun. While most of the kofun have been leveled to make way for the {{ill|Fujimi Industrial Complex|ja|富士見工業団地}}, {{ill|Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)}} and {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)}} remain intact. The kofun in this cluster are characterized by their dense distribution atop the region's narrow loam plateau, where they coexisted with evidence of residential sites. Notably, the Sanpōzuka Kofun was built directly over a residential site. The construction of the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster is believed to have taken place after the cessation of tomb construction in the {{ill|Sakitama Kofun Cluster|ja|埼玉古墳群}}, likely reflecting the rise of a new local ruling family.{{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == List of Kofun == * {{ill|Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)}} - Round tomb (Prefectural other_designation); also referred to as "The Stone Stage of the Kanto."{{Cite web|author=Gyoda City Board of Education, Cultural Property Protection Division|url=https://www.city.gyoda.lg.jp/41/03/10/bunkazai_itiran/hatimanyamakofunsekisitu.html|title=Hachiman-yama Kofun Stone Chamber|work=Gyoda City|date=2015-11-02|accessdate=2020-07-16}} * {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)}} - Square tomb (Prefectural other_designation) * Atagoyama Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb * Kojinyama Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb : Total length: 74 meters; construction era: early 6th century * Sasazuka Kofun - Round tomb * Sanpōzuka Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb : Total length: [[Category:pp error]]approximately 70 meters; features a tategata moats and external protrusions.{{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * Kusen-zuka Kofun - Round tomb * Yoroizuka Kofun - Round tomb Three additional unnamed tombs are present in the area. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * {{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|List of kofun in Japan|ja|Infobox ancient site一覧}} * {{ill|List of kofun in Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県の古墳一覧}} * {{ill|Sakitama Kofun Cluster|ja|埼玉古墳群}} == External Links == * {{Cite web|author=Saitama Prefectural Museum of Sakitama|url=https://sakitama-muse.spec.ed.jp/%E5%9F%BC%E7%8E%89%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3%E7%BE%A4%E7%B4%B9%E4%BB%8B/%E5%91%A8%E8%BE%BA%E3%81%AE%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3%E6%A1%88%E5%86%85|title=Guide to Nearby Notably, the Sanpōzuka Kofun was built directly over a residential site. (行田市)}} - Round tomb (Prefectural other_designation); also referred to as "The Stone Stage of the Kanto."{{Cite web|author=Gyoda City Board of Education, Cultural Property Protection external protrusions.{{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * Kusen-zuka Kofun - Round tomb * Yoroizuka revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "Burial Facility"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones[[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site |name=Wakakodama Kofun Cluster |image=[[File:Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda), entrance.JPG|280px]]
Entrance to the stone chamber of {{ill|Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)}} |location={{ill|Gyōda|ja|行田市}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}} |coordinates={{Coord|36|08|34.3|N|139|29|12.6|E|region:JP-08_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=Wakakodama Kofun Cluster}} |map_size=3 {{ill|zenpokoenfun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun}} (keyhole-shaped kofun), 8 {{ill|empun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun}} (round kofun), and {{ill|hōfun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun}} (square kofun) |built= |Burial Facilities={{ill|Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber}} and others |Interred_individual=Unknown |burial goods= |other_designation={{ill|Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)}} and {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)}} (Prefectural Designation) |map={{location map|Japan Saitama|label=Wakakodama
Kofun Cluster|lat_deg=36|lat_min=08|lat_sec=34.3|lon_deg=139|lon_min=29|lon_sec=12.6|mark=|marksize=8|float=center|border=none|position=bottom|width=200|caption=location in Saitama Prefecture}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|36|08|34.3|N|139|29|12.6|E}}}} }} '''Wakakodama Kofun Cluster''' (若小玉古墳群, Wakakodama Kofun Cluster) is a group of {{ill|kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun}} (ancient Kofuns) located in {{ill|Gyōda|ja|行田市}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}}, Japan. == Overview == As of the early {{ill|Shōwa period|ja|昭和時代}}, the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster consisted of three keyhole-shaped tombs ({{ill|zenpokoenfun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun}}), eight round tombs ({{ill|empun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun}}), and several square tombs ({{ill|hōfun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun}}), including prominent examples such as Atagoyama Kofun and Kojinyama Kofun. While most of the kofun have been leveled to make way for the {{ill|Fujimi Industrial Complex|ja|富士見工業団地}}, {{ill|Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)}} and {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)}} remain intact. The kofun in this cluster are characterized by their dense distribution atop the region's narrow loam plateau, where they coexisted with evidence of residential sites. Notably, the Sanpōzuka Kofun was built directly over a residential site. The construction of the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster is believed to have taken place after the cessation of tomb construction in the {{ill|Sakitama Kofun Cluster|ja|埼玉古墳群}}, likely reflecting the rise of a new local ruling family.{{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == List of Kofun == * {{ill|Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)}} - Round tomb (Prefectural other_designation); also referred to as "The Stone Stage of the Kanto."{{Cite web|author=Gyoda City Board of Education, Cultural Property Protection Division|url=https://www.city.gyoda.lg.jp/41/03/10/bunkazai_itiran/hatimanyamakofunsekisitu.html|title=Hachiman-yama Kofun Stone Chamber|work=Gyoda City|date=2015-11-02|accessdate=2020-07-16}} * {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)}} - Square tomb (Prefectural other_designation) * Atagoyama Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb * Kojinyama Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb : Total length: 74 meters; construction era: early 6th century * Sasazuka Kofun - Round tomb * Sanpōzuka Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb : Total length: [[Category:pp error]]approximately 70 meters; features a tategata moats and external protrusions.{{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * Kusen-zuka Kofun - Round tomb * Yoroizuka Kofun - Round tomb Three additional unnamed tombs are present in the area. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * {{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|List of kofun in Japan|ja|Infobox ancient site一覧}} * {{ill|List of kofun in Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県の古墳一覧}} * {{ill|Sakitama Kofun Cluster|ja|埼玉古墳群}} == External Links == * {{Cite web|author=Saitama Prefectural Museum of Sakitama|url=https://sakitama-muse.spec.ed.jp/%E5%9F%BC%E7%8E%89%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3%E7%BE%A4%E7%B4%B9%E4%BB%8B/%E5%91%A8%E8%BE%BA%E3%81%AE%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3%E6%A1%88%E5%86%85|title=Guide to Nearby Kofun|work=Saitama Prefecture}} {{citation needed|Wakakodama Kofun Cluster}} [[Category:kk]][[Category:kk]][[Category:Kofun in Saitama Prefecture]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:kk]][[Category:History of Kofun Cluster|lat_deg=36|lat_min=08|lat_sec=34.3|lon_deg=139|lon_min=29|lon_sec=12.6|mark=|marksize=8|float=center|border=none|position=bottom|width=200|caption=location in Saitama Prefecture}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|36|08|34.3|N|139|29|12.6|E}}}} }} '''Wakakodama Kofun Cluster''' (若小玉古墳群, Wakakodama Kofun Cluster) is a group of {{ill|kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun}} (ancient Kofuns) located in {{ill|Gyōda|ja|行田市}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}}, Japan. == Overview == As of the early {{ill|Shōwa period|ja|昭和時代}}, the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster consisted of three keyhole-shaped tombs ({{ill|zenpokoenfun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun}}), eight round tombs ({{ill|empun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun}}), and several square tombs ({{ill|hōfun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun}}), including prominent examples such as Atagoyama Kofun and Kojinyama Kofun. While most of the kofun have been leveled to make way for the {{ill|Fujimi Industrial Complex|ja|富士見工業団地}}, {{ill|Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)}} and {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)}} remain intact. The kofun in this cluster are characterized by their dense distribution atop the region's narrow loam plateau, where they coexisted with evidence of residential sites. Notably, the Sanpōzuka Kofun was built directly over a residential site. The construction of the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster is believed to have taken place after the cessation of tomb construction in the {{ill|Sakitama Kofun Cluster|ja|埼玉古墳群}}, likely reflecting the rise of a new local ruling family.{{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == List of Kofun == * {{ill|Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)}} - Round tomb (Prefectural other_designation); also referred to as "The Stone Stage of the Kanto."{{Cite web|author=Gyoda City Board of Education, Cultural Property Protection Division|url=https://www.city.gyoda.lg.jp/41/03/10/bunkazai_itiran/hatimanyamakofunsekisitu.html|title=Hachiman-yama Kofun Stone Chamber|work=Gyoda City|date=2015-11-02|accessdate=2020-07-16}} * {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)}} - Square tomb (Prefectural other_designation) * Atagoyama Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb * Kojinyama Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb : Total length: 74 meters; construction era: early 6th century * Sasazuka Kofun - Round tomb * Sanpōzuka Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb : Total length: [[Category:pp error]]approximately 70 meters; features a tategata moats and external protrusions.{{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * Kusen-zuka Kofun - Round tomb * Yoroizuka Kofun - Round tomb Three additional unnamed tombs are present in the area. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * {{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|List of kofun in Japan|ja|Infobox ancient site一覧}} * {{ill|List of kofun in Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県の古墳一覧}} * {{ill|Sakitama Kofun Cluster|ja|埼玉古墳群}} == External Links == * {{Cite web|author=Saitama Prefectural Museum of revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "Burial Facility"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones[[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site |name=Wakakodama Kofun Cluster |image=[[File:Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda), entrance.JPG|280px]]

{{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "Burial Facility"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones[[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site |name=Wakakodama Kofun Cluster |image=[[File:Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda), entrance.JPG|280px]]
Entrance to the stone chamber of {{ill|Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)}} |location={{ill|Gyōda|ja|行田市}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}} |coordinates={{Coord|36|08|34.3|N|139|29|12.6|E|region:JP-08_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=Wakakodama Kofun Cluster}} |map_size=3 {{ill|zenpokoenfun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun}} (keyhole-shaped kofun), 8 {{ill|empun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun}} (round kofun), and {{ill|hōfun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun}} (square kofun) |built= |burial={{ill|Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber}} and others |Interred_individual=Unknown |burial goods= |other_designation={{ill|Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)}} and {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)}} (Prefectural Designation) |map={{location map|Japan Saitama|label=Wakakodama
Kofun Cluster|lat_deg=36|lat_min=08|lat_sec=34.3|lon_deg=139|lon_min=29|lon_sec=12.6|mark=|marksize=8|float=center|border=none|position=bottom|width=200|caption=location in Saitama Prefecture}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|36|08|34.3|N|139|29|12.6|E}}}} }} '''Wakakodama Kofun Cluster''' (若小玉古墳群, Wakakodama Kofun Cluster) is a group of {{ill|kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun}} (ancient Kofuns) located in {{ill|Gyōda|ja|行田市}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}}, Japan. == Overview == As of the early {{ill|Shōwa period|ja|昭和時代}}, the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster consisted of three keyhole-shaped tombs ({{ill|zenpokoenfun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun}}), eight round tombs ({{ill|empun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun}}), and several square tombs ({{ill|hōfun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun}}), including prominent examples such as Atagoyama Kofun and Kojinyama Kofun. While most of the kofun have been leveled to make way for the {{ill|Fujimi Industrial Complex|ja|富士見工業団地}}, {{ill|Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)}} and {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)}} remain intact. The kofun in this cluster are characterized by their dense distribution atop the region's narrow loam plateau, where they coexisted with evidence of residential sites. Notably, the Sanpōzuka Kofun was built directly over a residential site. The construction of the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster is believed to have taken place after the cessation of tomb construction in the {{ill|Sakitama Kofun Cluster|ja|埼玉古墳群}}, likely reflecting the rise of a new local ruling family.{{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == List of Kofun == * {{ill|Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)}} - Round tomb (Prefectural other_designation); also referred to as "The Stone Stage of the Kanto."{{Cite web|author=Gyoda City Board of Education, Cultural Property Protection Division|url=https://www.city.gyoda.lg.jp/41/03/10/bunkazai_itiran/hatimanyamakofunsekisitu.html|title=Hachiman-yama Kofun Stone Chamber|work=Gyoda City|date=2015-11-02|accessdate=2020-07-16}} * {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)}} - Square tomb (Prefectural other_designation) * Atagoyama Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb * Kojinyama Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb : Total length: 74 meters; construction era: early 6th century * Sasazuka Kofun - Round tomb * Sanpōzuka Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb : Total length: [[Category:pp error]]approximately 70 meters; features a tategata moats and external protrusions.{{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * Kusen-zuka Kofun - Round tomb * Yoroizuka Kofun - Round tomb Three additional unnamed tombs are present in the area. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * {{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|List of kofun in Japan|ja|Infobox ancient site一覧}} * {{ill|List of kofun in Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県の古墳一覧}} * {{ill|Sakitama Kofun Cluster|ja|埼玉古墳群}} == External Links == * {{Cite web|author=Saitama Prefectural Museum of Entrance to the stone chamber of {{ill|Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)}} |location={{ill|Gyōda|ja|行田市}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}} |coordinates={{Coord|36|08|34.3|N|139|29|12.6|E|region:JP-08_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=Wakakodama Kofun Cluster}} |map_size=3 {{ill|zenpokoenfun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun}} (keyhole-shaped kofun), 8 {{ill|empun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun}} (round kofun), and {{ill|hōfun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun}} (square kofun) |built= |burial={{ill|Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber}} and others |Interred_individual=Unknown |burial goods= |other_designation={{ill|Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)}} and {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)}} (Prefectural Designation) |map={{location map|Japan Saitama|label=Wakakodama
Kofun Cluster|lat_deg=36|lat_min=08|lat_sec=34.3|lon_deg=139|lon_min=29|lon_sec=12.6|mark=|marksize=8|float=center|border=none|position=bottom|width=200|caption=location in Saitama Prefecture}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|36|08|34.3|N|139|29|12.6|E}}}} }} '''Wakakodama Kofun Cluster''' (若小玉古墳群, Wakakodama Kofun Cluster) is a group of {{ill|kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun}} (ancient Kofuns) located in {{ill|Gyōda|ja|行田市}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}}, Japan. == Overview == As of the early {{ill|Shōwa period|ja|昭和時代}}, the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster consisted of three keyhole-shaped tombs ({{ill|zenpokoenfun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun}}), eight round tombs ({{ill|empun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun}}), and several square tombs ({{ill|hōfun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun}}), including prominent examples such as Atagoyama Kofun and Kojinyama Kofun. While most of the kofun have been leveled to make way for the {{ill|Fujimi Industrial Complex|ja|富士見工業団地}}, {{ill|Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)}} and {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)}} remain intact. The kofun in this cluster are characterized by their dense distribution atop the region's narrow loam plateau, where they coexisted with evidence of residential sites. Notably, the Sanpōzuka Kofun was built directly over a residential site. The construction of the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster is believed to have taken place after the cessation of tomb construction in the {{ill|Sakitama Kofun Cluster|ja|埼玉古墳群}}, likely reflecting the rise of a new local ruling family.{{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == List of Kofun == * {{ill|Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)}} - Round tomb (Prefectural other_designation); also referred to as "The Stone Stage of the Kanto."{{Cite web|author=Gyoda City Board of Education, Cultural Property Protection Division|url=https://www.city.gyoda.lg.jp/41/03/10/bunkazai_itiran/hatimanyamakofunsekisitu.html|title=Hachiman-yama Kofun Stone Chamber|work=Gyoda City|date=2015-11-02|accessdate=2020-07-16}} * {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)}} - Square tomb (Prefectural other_designation) * Atagoyama Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb * Kojinyama Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb : Total length: 74 meters; construction era: early 6th century * Sasazuka Kofun - Round tomb * Sanpōzuka Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb : Total length: [[Category:pp error]]approximately 70 meters; features a tategata moats and external protrusions.{{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * Kusen-zuka Kofun - Round tomb * Yoroizuka Kofun - Round tomb Three additional unnamed tombs are present in the area. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * {{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|List of Entrance to the stone chamber of {{ill|Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)}} |location={{ill|Gyōda|ja|行田市}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}} |coordinates={{Coord|36|08|34.3|N|139|29|12.6|E|region:JP-08_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=Wakakodama Kofun Cluster}} |map_size=3 {{ill|zenpokoenfun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun}} (keyhole-shaped kofun), 8 {{ill|empun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun}} (round kofun), and {{ill|hōfun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun}} (square kofun) |built= |burial={{ill|Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber}} and others |Interred_individual=Unknown |burial goods= |Historic Site={{ill|Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)}} and {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)}} (Prefectural Designation) |map={{location map|Japan Saitama|label=Wakakodama
Kofun Cluster|lat_deg=36|lat_min=08|lat_sec=34.3|lon_deg=139|lon_min=29|lon_sec=12.6|mark=|marksize=8|float=center|border=none|position=bottom|width=200|caption=location in Saitama Prefecture}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|36|08|34.3|N|139|29|12.6|E}}}} }} '''Wakakodama Kofun Cluster''' (若小玉古墳群, Wakakodama Kofun Cluster) is a group of {{ill|kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun}} (ancient Kofuns) located in {{ill|Gyōda|ja|行田市}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}}, Japan. == Overview == As of the early {{ill|Shōwa period|ja|昭和時代}}, the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster consisted of three keyhole-shaped tombs ({{ill|zenpokoenfun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun}}), eight round tombs ({{ill|empun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun}}), and several square tombs ({{ill|hōfun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun}}), including prominent examples such as Atagoyama Kofun and Kojinyama Kofun. While most of the kofun have been leveled to make way for the {{ill|Fujimi Industrial Complex|ja|富士見工業団地}}, {{ill|Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)}} and {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)}} remain intact. The kofun in this cluster are characterized by their dense distribution atop the region's narrow loam plateau, where they coexisted with evidence of residential sites. Notably, the Sanpōzuka Kofun was built directly over a residential site. The construction of the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster is believed to have taken place after the cessation of tomb construction in the {{ill|Sakitama Kofun Cluster|ja|埼玉古墳群}}, likely reflecting the rise of a new local ruling family.{{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == List of Kofun == * {{ill|Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)}} - Round tomb (Prefectural Historic Site); also referred to as "The Stone Stage of the Kanto."{{Cite web|author=Gyoda City Board of Education, Cultural Property Protection Division|url=https://www.city.gyoda.lg.jp/41/03/10/bunkazai_itiran/hatimanyamakofunsekisitu.html|title=Hachiman-yama Kofun Stone Chamber|work=Gyoda City|date=2015-11-02|accessdate=2020-07-16}} * {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)}} - Square tomb (Prefectural Historic Site) * Atagoyama Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb * Kojinyama Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb : Total length: 74 meters; construction era: early 6th century * Sasazuka Kofun - Round tomb * Sanpōzuka Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb : Total length: [[Category:pp error]]approximately 70 meters; features a tategata moats and external protrusions.{{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * Kusen-zuka Kofun - Round tomb * Yoroizuka Kofun - Round tomb Three additional unnamed tombs are present in the area. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * {{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|List of {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "Burial Facility"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones[[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site |name=Wakakodama Kofun Cluster |image=[[File:Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda), entrance.JPG|280px]]
Entrance to the stone chamber of {{ill|Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)}} |location={{ill|Gyōda|ja|行田市}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}} |coordinates={{Coord|36|08|34.3|N|139|29|12.6|E|region:JP-08_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=Wakakodama Kofun Cluster}} |map_size=3 {{ill|zenpokoenfun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun}} (keyhole-shaped kofun), 8 {{ill|empun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun}} (round kofun), and {{ill|hōfun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun}} (square kofun) |built= |burial={{ill|Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber}} and others |Interred_individual=Unknown |burial goods= |Historic Site={{ill|Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)}} and {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)}} (Prefectural Designation) |map={{location map|Japan Saitama|label=Wakakodama
Kofun Cluster|lat_deg=36|lat_min=08|lat_sec=34.3|lon_deg=139|lon_min=29|lon_sec=12.6|mark=|marksize=8|float=center|border=none|position=bottom|width=200|caption=location in Saitama Prefecture}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|36|08|34.3|N|139|29|12.6|E}}}} }} '''Wakakodama Kofun Cluster''' (若小玉古墳群, Wakakodama Kofun Cluster) is a group of {{ill|kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun}} (ancient Kofuns) located in {{ill|Gyōda|ja|行田市}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}}, Japan. == Overview == As of the early {{ill|Shōwa period|ja|昭和時代}}, the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster consisted of three keyhole-shaped tombs ({{ill|zenpokoenfun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun}}), eight round tombs ({{ill|empun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun}}), and several square tombs ({{ill|hōfun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun}}), including prominent examples such as Atagoyama Kofun and Kojinyama Kofun. While most of the kofun have been leveled to make way for the {{ill|Fujimi Industrial Complex|ja|富士見工業団地}}, {{ill|Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)}} and {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)}} remain intact. The kofun in this cluster are characterized by their dense distribution atop the region's narrow loam plateau, where they coexisted with evidence of residential sites. Notably, the Sanpōzuka Kofun was built directly over a residential site. The construction of the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster is believed to have taken place after the cessation of tomb construction in the {{ill|Sakitama Kofun Cluster|ja|埼玉古墳群}}, likely reflecting the rise of a new local ruling family.{{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == List of Kofun == * {{ill|Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)}} - Round tomb (Prefectural Historic Site); also referred to as "The Stone Stage of the Kanto."{{Cite web|author=Gyoda City Board of Education, Cultural Property Protection Division|url=https://www.city.gyoda.lg.jp/41/03/10/bunkazai_itiran/hatimanyamakofunsekisitu.html|title=Hachiman-yama Kofun Stone Chamber|work=Gyoda City|date=2015-11-02|accessdate=2020-07-16}} * {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)}} - Square tomb (Prefectural Historic Site) * Atagoyama Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb * Kojinyama Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb : Total length: 74 meters; construction era: early 6th century * Sasazuka Kofun - Round tomb * Sanpōzuka Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb : Total length: [[Category:pp error]]approximately 70 meters; features a tategata moats and external protrusions.{{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * Kusen-zuka Kofun - Round tomb * Yoroizuka Kofun - Round tomb Three additional unnamed tombs are present in the area. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * {{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|List of kofun in Japan|ja|Infobox ancient site一覧}} * {{ill|List of kofun in Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県の古墳一覧}} * {{ill|Sakitama Kofun Cluster|ja|埼玉古墳群}} == External Links == * {{Cite web|author=Saitama Prefectural Museum of revision.text:
{{日本の古墳 |名称=若小玉古墳群 |画像=[[File:Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda), entrance.JPG|280px]]
[[八幡山古墳 (行田市)|八幡山古墳]]石室開口部 |所在地=[[埼玉県]][[行田市]]藤原町ほか |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|36|08|34.3|N|139|29|12.6|E|region:JP-08_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=若王子古墳群}} |規模=[[前方後円墳]]3基、[[円墳]]8基・[[方墳]] |築造時期 = |埋葬施設 = [[横穴式石室]]など |被葬者 = 不明 |出土品 = |史跡 = [[八幡山古墳 (行田市)|八幡山古墳]]・[[地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)|地蔵塚古墳]]（県指定） |特記事項 = |地図2 = {{Location map|Japan Saitama|label=若小玉
古墳群|lat_deg=36|lat_min=08|lat_sec=34.3|lon_deg=139|lon_min=29|lon_sec=12.6|mark=|marksize=8|float=center|border=none|position=bottom|width=200|caption=埼玉県内の所在地}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|36|08|34.3|N|139|29|12.6|E}}}} }} '''若小玉墳群'''（わかこだまこふんぐん/わくだまこふんぐん）は、[[埼玉県]][[行田市]]にある[[古墳群]]である。 == 概要 == [[昭和]]初期までは愛宕山古墳、荒神山古墳など、3基の[[前方後円墳]]と、8基の[[円墳]]・[[方墳]]が存在した。現在、ほとんどの古墳は削平され[[富士見工業団地]]になっているが[[八幡山古墳 (行田市)|八幡山古墳]]と[[地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)|地蔵塚古墳]]が残っている。 特徴として、この地域にあった面積の狭い[[ローム (土壌)|ローム]][[台地]]の上に、[[住居]]跡などと共に密集して築かれていることがある。三宝塚古墳は住居跡の上に築造されていた。 [[埼玉古墳群]]の築造が止んだ後に、新興の豪族が築いたと推定されている{{Sfn|田代|塩野|重田|森田|2010|pp=46-47}}。 == 古墳の一覧 == * [[八幡山古墳 (行田市)|八幡山古墳]] - 円墳（埼玉県指定[[史跡]]）、「関東の[[石舞台古墳|石舞台]]」とも形容される{{Cite web|和書|author=行田市教育委員会生涯学習部文化財保護課文化財保護担当|url=https://www.city.gyoda.lg.jp/41/03/10/bunkazai_itiran/hatimanyamakofunsekisitu.html|title=八幡山古墳石室|work=行田市|date=2015-11-02|accessdate=2020-07-16}}。 * [[地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)|地蔵塚古墳]] - 方墳（埼玉県指定史跡） * 愛宕山古墳 - 前方後円墳 * 荒神山古墳（こうじんやまこふん） - 前方後円墳 :全長74メートル。築造年代は[[6世紀]]の前半と考えられている。 * 笹塚古墳（ささづかこふん） - 円墳 * 三宝塚古墳（さんぽうづかこふん） - 前方後円墳 :全長約70メートル。盾型周溝の外側に[[造り出し]]がある{{Sfn|和田晴吾ほか|1994|p=616}}。 * 九仙塚古墳（くせんづかこふん） - 円墳 * 鎧塚古墳（よろいづかこふん） - 円墳 その他無名の古墳が3基 == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} ==参考図書== *{{Cite book|和書|author=和田晴吾ほか|authorlink=和田晴吾|title=前方後円墳集成 東北・関東編|publisher=[[山川出版社]]|year=1994|date=1994-02-01|page=616|isbn=4634500108|ref=harv}} *{{Cite book|和書|last=田代|first=脩|last2=塩野|first2=博|last3=重田|first3=正夫|last4=森田|first4=武|title=埼玉県の歴史|publisher=[[山川出版社]]|series=県史11|year=2010|date=2010-11-01|page=46|isbn=4634321114|ref=harv}} == 関連項目 == * [[日本の古墳一覧]] * [[埼玉県の古墳一覧]] * [[埼玉古墳群]] == 外部リンク == *{{Cite web|和書|author=[[埼玉県立さきたま史跡の博物館]]|url=https://sakitama-muse.spec.ed.jp/%E5%9F%BC%E7%8E%89%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3%E7%BE%A4%E7%B4%B9%E4%BB%8B/%E5%91%A8%E8%BE%BA%E3%81%AE%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3%E6%A1%88%E5%86%85|title=周辺の古墳案内|work=埼玉県|accessdate=2020-07-18}} {{Japanese-history-stub}} {{デフォルトソート:わかこたまこふんくん}} [[category:埼玉県の古墳]] [[category:行田市の歴史]] [[Category:古墳群]]

revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "Burial Facility"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site |name=Wakakodama Kofun Cluster |image=[[File:Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda), entrance.JPG|280px]]
Entrance to the stone chamber of {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} |location=[[:en:Gyōda|Gyōda]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]] |coordinates={{Coord|36|08|34.3|N|139|29|12.6|E|region:JP-08_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=Wakakodama Kofun Cluster}} |map_size=3 [[:en:Zenpokoenfun|Zenpokoenfun]] (keyhole-shaped kofun), 8 {{ill|empun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/empun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|qq=}} (round kofun), and {{ill|hōfun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/hōfun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|qq=}} (square kofun) |built= |burial={{ill|Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} and others |Interred_individual=Unknown |burial goods= |Historic Site={{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} and {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} (Prefectural Designation) |map={{location map|Japan Saitama|label=Wakakodama
Kofun Cluster|lat_deg=36|lat_min=08|lat_sec=34.3|lon_deg=139|lon_min=29|lon_sec=12.6|mark=|marksize=8|float=center|border=none|position=bottom|width=200|caption=location in Saitama Prefecture}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|36|08|34.3|N|139|29|12.6|E}}}} }} '''Wakakodama Kofun Cluster''' (若小玉古墳群, Wakakodama Kofun Cluster) is a group of [[:en:Kofun|Kofun]] (ancient Kofuns) located in [[:en:Gyōda|Gyōda]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]], Japan. == Overview == As of the early {{ill|Shōwa period|ja|昭和時代|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōwa period|qq=}}, the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster consisted of three keyhole-shaped tombs ([[:en:Zenpokoenfun|Zenpokoenfun]]), eight round tombs ({{ill|empun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/empun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|qq=}}), and several square tombs ({{ill|hōfun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/hōfun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|qq=}}), including prominent examples such as Atagoyama Kofun and Kojinyama Kofun. While most of the kofun have been leveled to make way for the {{ill|Fujimi Industrial Complex|ja|富士見工業団地|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujimi Industrial Complex|qq=}}, {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} and {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} remain intact. The kofun in this cluster are characterized by their dense distribution atop the region's narrow loam plateau, where they coexisted with evidence of residential sites. Notably, the Sanpōzuka Kofun was built directly over a residential site. The construction of the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster is believed to have taken place after the cessation of tomb construction in the [[:en:Sakitama Kofun Cluster|Sakitama Kofun Cluster]], likely reflecting the rise of a new local ruling family.{{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == List of Kofun == * {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} - Round tomb (Prefectural Historic Site); also referred to as "The Stone Stage of the Kanto."{{Cite web|author=Gyoda City Board of Education, Cultural Property Protection Division|url=https://www.city.gyoda.lg.jp/41/03/10/bunkazai_itiran/hatimanyamakofunsekisitu.html|title=Hachiman-yama Kofun Stone Chamber|work=Gyoda City|date=2015-11-02|accessdate=2020-07-16}} * {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} - Square tomb (Prefectural Historic Site) * Atagoyama Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb * Kojinyama Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb : Total length: 74 meters; construction era: early 6th century * Sasazuka Kofun - Round tomb * Sanpōzuka Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb : Total length: approximately 70 meters; features a tategata moats and external protrusions.{{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * Kusen-zuka Kofun - Round tomb * Yoroizuka Kofun - Round tomb Three additional unnamed tombs are present in the area. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * {{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|List of kofun in Japan|ja|Infobox ancient site一覧|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Japan|qq=}} * {{ill|List of kofun in Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県の古墳一覧|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Saitama Prefecture|qq=}} * [[:en:Sakitama Kofun Cluster|Sakitama Kofun Cluster]] == External Links == * {{Cite web|author=Saitama Prefectural Museum of Sakitama|url=https://sakitama-muse.spec.ed.jp/%E5%9F%BC%E7%8E%89%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3%E7%BE%A4%E7%B4%B9%E4%BB%8B/%E5%91%A8%E8%BE%BA%E3%81%AE%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3%E6%A1%88%E5%86%85|title=Guide to Nearby Kofun|work=Saitama Prefecture}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|若小玉古墳群|version=98258662|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Kofun in Saitama Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Gyoda]] [[Category:Kofun clusters]] [[Category:K]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[sn:Wakakodama Kofun Cluster]]}} [[sn:Wakakodama Kofun Cluster]] [[ja:若小玉古墳群]] [[sn:akakodama Kofun Cluster]] [[Category:埼玉県の古墳]]

Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site |name=Wakakodama Kofun Cluster |image=[[File:Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda), entrance.JPG|280px]]
Entrance to the stone chamber of {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} |location=[[:en:Gyōda|Gyōda]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]] |coordinates={{Coord|36|08|34.3|N|139|29|12.6|E|region:JP-08_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=Wakakodama Kofun Cluster}} |map_size=3 [[:en:Zenpokoenfun|Zenpokoenfun]] (keyhole-shaped kofun), 8 {{ill|empun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/empun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|qq=}} (round kofun), and {{ill|hōfun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/hōfun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|qq=}} (square kofun) |built= |burial={{ill|Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} and others |Interred_individual=Unknown |burial goods= |Historic Site={{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} and {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} (Prefectural Designation) |map={{location map|Japan Saitama|label=Wakakodama
Kofun Cluster|lat_deg=36|lat_min=08|lat_sec=34.3|lon_deg=139|lon_min=29|lon_sec=12.6|mark=|marksize=8|float=center|border=none|position=bottom|width=200|caption=location in Saitama Prefecture}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|36|08|34.3|N|139|29|12.6|E}}}} }} '''Wakakodama Kofun Cluster''' (若小玉古墳群, Wakakodama Kofun Cluster) is a group of [[:en:Kofun|Kofun]] (ancient Kofuns) located in [[:en:Gyōda|Gyōda]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]], Japan. == Overview == As of the early {{ill|Shōwa period|ja|昭和時代|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōwa period|qq=}}, the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster consisted of three keyhole-shaped tombs ([[:en:Zenpokoenfun|Zenpokoenfun]]), eight round tombs ({{ill|empun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/empun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|qq=}}), and several square tombs ({{ill|hōfun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/hōfun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|qq=}}), including prominent examples such as Atagoyama Kofun and Kojinyama Kofun. While most of the kofun have been leveled to make way for the {{ill|Fujimi Industrial Complex|ja|富士見工業団地|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujimi Industrial Complex|qq=}}, {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} and {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} remain intact. The kofun in this cluster are characterized by their dense distribution atop the region's narrow loam plateau, where they coexisted with evidence of residential sites. Notably, the Sanpōzuka Kofun was built directly over a residential site. The construction of the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster is believed to have taken place after the cessation of tomb construction in the [[:en:Sakitama Kofun Cluster|Sakitama Kofun Cluster]], likely reflecting the rise of a new local ruling family.{{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == List of Kofun == * {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} - Round tomb (Prefectural Historic Site); also referred to as "The Stone Stage of the Kanto."{{Cite web|author=Gyoda City Board of Education, Cultural Property Protection Division|url=https://www.city.gyoda.lg.jp/41/03/10/bunkazai_itiran/hatimanyamakofunsekisitu.html|title=Hachiman-yama Kofun Stone Chamber|work=Gyoda City|date=2015-11-02|accessdate=2020-07-16}} * {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} - Square tomb (Prefectural Historic Site) * Atagoyama Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb * Kojinyama Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb : Total length: 74 meters; construction era: early 6th century * Sasazuka Kofun - Round tomb * Sanpōzuka Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb : Total length: approximately 70 meters; features a tategata moats and external protrusions.{{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * Kusen-zuka Kofun - Round tomb * Yoroizuka Kofun - Round tomb Three additional unnamed tombs are present in the area. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * {{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|List of kofun in Japan|ja|Infobox ancient site一覧|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Japan|qq=}} * {{ill|List of kofun in Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県の古墳一覧|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Saitama Prefecture|qq=}} * [[:en:Sakitama Kofun Cluster|Sakitama Kofun Cluster]] == External Links == * {{Cite web|author=Saitama Prefectural Museum of Sakitama|url=https://sakitama-muse.spec.ed.jp/%E5%9F%BC%E7%8E%89%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3%E7%BE%A4%E7%B4%B9%E4%BB%8B/%E5%91%A8%E8%BE%BA%E3%81%AE%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3%E6%A1%88%E5%86%85|title=Guide to Nearby Kofun|work=Saitama Prefecture}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|若小玉古墳群|version=98258662|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Kofun in Saitama Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Gyoda]] [[Category:Kofun clusters]] [[Category:K]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[sn:Wakakodama Kofun Cluster]]}} [[sn:Wakakodama Kofun Cluster]] [[ja:若小玉古墳群]] [[sn:akakodama Kofun Cluster]] [[Category:埼玉県の古墳]] [[Category:行田市の歴史]]

Kofun Cluster|lat_deg=36|lat_min=08|lat_sec=34.3|lon_deg=139|lon_min=29|lon_sec=12.6|mark=|marksize=8|float=center|border=none|position=bottom|width=200|caption=location in Saitama Prefecture}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|36|08|34.3|N|139|29|12.6|E}}}} }} '''Wakakodama Kofun Cluster''' (若小玉古墳群, Wakakodama Kofun Cluster) is a group of [[:en:Kofun|Kofun]] (ancient Kofuns) located in [[:en:Gyōda|Gyōda]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]], Japan. == Overview == As of the early {{ill|Shōwa period|ja|昭和時代|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōwa period|qq=}}, the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster consisted of three keyhole-shaped tombs ([[:en:Zenpokoenfun|Zenpokoenfun]]), eight round tombs ({{ill|empun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/empun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|qq=}}), and several square tombs ({{ill|hōfun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/hōfun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|qq=}}), including prominent examples such as Atagoyama Kofun and Kojinyama Kofun. While most of the kofun have been leveled to make way for the {{ill|Fujimi Industrial Complex|ja|富士見工業団地|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujimi Industrial Complex|qq=}}, {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} and {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} remain intact. The kofun in this cluster are characterized by their dense distribution atop the region's narrow loam plateau, where they coexisted with evidence of residential sites. Notably, the Sanpōzuka Kofun was built directly over a residential site. The construction of the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster is believed to have taken place after the cessation of tomb construction in the [[:en:Sakitama Kofun Cluster|Sakitama Kofun Cluster]], likely reflecting the rise of a new local ruling family.{{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == List of Kofun == * {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} - Round tomb (Prefectural Historic Site); also referred to as "The Stone Stage of the Kanto."{{Cite web|author=Gyoda City Board of Education, Cultural Property Protection Division|url=https://www.city.gyoda.lg.jp/41/03/10/bunkazai_itiran/hatimanyamakofunsekisitu.html|title=Hachiman-yama Kofun Stone Chamber|work=Gyoda City|date=2015-11-02|accessdate=2020-07-16}} * {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} - Square tomb (Prefectural Historic Site) * Atagoyama Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb * Kojinyama Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb : Total length: 74 meters; construction era: early 6th century * Sasazuka Kofun - Round tomb * Sanpōzuka Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb : Total length: approximately 70 meters; features a tategata moats and external protrusions.{{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * Kusen-zuka Kofun - Round tomb * Yoroizuka Kofun - Round tomb Three additional unnamed tombs are present in the area. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * {{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|List of kofun in Japan|ja|Infobox ancient site一覧|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Japan|qq=}} * {{ill|List of kofun in Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県の古墳一覧|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Saitama Prefecture|qq=}} * [[:en:Sakitama Kofun Cluster|Sakitama Kofun Cluster]] == External Links == * {{Cite web|author=Saitama Prefectural Museum of Sakitama|url=https://sakitama-muse.spec.ed.jp/%E5%9F%BC%E7%8E%89%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3%E7%BE%A4%E7%B4%B9%E4%BB%8B/%E5%91%A8%E8%BE%BA%E3%81%AE%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3%E6%A1%88%E5%86%85|title=Guide to Nearby Kofun|work=Saitama Prefecture}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|若小玉古墳群|version=98258662|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Kofun in Saitama Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Gyoda]] [[Category:Kofun clusters]] [[Category:K]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[sn:Wakakodama Kofun Cluster]]}} [[sn:Wakakodama Kofun Cluster]] [[ja:若小玉古墳群]] [[sn:akakodama Kofun Cluster]] [[Category:Kofun of Saitama prefecture]] [[Category:History of Gyoda, Saitama]]

The kofun in this cluster are characterized by their dense distribution atop the region's narrow loam plateau, where they coexisted with evidence of residential sites. Notably, the Sanpōzuka Kofun was built directly over a residential site. The construction of the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster is believed to have taken place after the cessation of tomb construction in the [[:en:Sakitama Kofun Cluster|Sakitama Kofun Cluster]], likely reflecting the rise of a new local ruling family.{{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == List of Kofun == * {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} - Kofun Cluster|lat_deg=36|lat_min=08|lat_sec=34.3|lon_deg=139|lon_min=29|lon_sec=12.6|mark=|marksize=8|float=center|border=none|position=bottom|width=200|caption=location in Saitama Prefecture}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|36|08|34.3|N|139|29|12.6|E}}}} }} '''Wakakodama Kofun Cluster''' (若小玉古墳群, Wakakodama Kofun Cluster) is a group of [[:en:Kofun|Kofun]] (ancient Kofuns) located in [[:en:Gyōda|Gyōda]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]], Japan. == Overview == As of the early {{ill|Shōwa period|ja|昭和時代|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōwa period|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 昭和}}, the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster consisted of three keyhole-shaped tombs ([[:en:Zenpokoenfun|Zenpokoenfun]]), eight round tombs ({{ill|empun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/empun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}), and several square tombs ({{ill|hōfun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/hōfun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}), including prominent examples such as Atagoyama Kofun and Kojinyama Kofun. While most of the kofun have been leveled to make way for the {{ill|Fujimi Industrial Complex|ja|富士見工業団地|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujimi Industrial Complex|qq=}}, {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} and {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} remain intact. The kofun in this cluster are characterized by their dense distribution atop the region's narrow loam plateau, where they coexisted with evidence of residential sites. Notably, the Sanpōzuka Kofun was built directly over a residential site. The construction of the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster is believed to have taken place after the cessation of tomb construction in the [[:en:Sakitama Kofun Cluster|Sakitama Kofun Cluster]], likely reflecting the rise of a new local ruling family.{{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == List of Kofun == * {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} - Round tomb (Prefectural Historic Site); also referred to as "The Stone Stage of the Kanto."{{Cite web|author=Gyoda City Board of Education, Cultural Property Protection Division|url=https://www.city.gyoda.lg.jp/41/03/10/bunkazai_itiran/hatimanyamakofunsekisitu.html|title=Hachiman-yama Kofun Stone Chamber|work=Gyoda City|date=2015-11-02|accessdate=2020-07-16}} * {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} - Square tomb (Prefectural Historic Site) * Atagoyama Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb * Kojinyama Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb : Total length: 74 meters; construction era: early 6th century * Sasazuka Kofun - Round tomb * Sanpōzuka Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb : Total length: approximately 70 meters; features a tategata moats and external protrusions.{{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * Kusen-zuka Kofun - Round tomb * Yoroizuka Kofun - Round tomb Three additional unnamed tombs are present in the area. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * {{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|List of kofun in Japan|ja|Infobox ancient site一覧|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Japan|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|List of kofun in Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県の古墳一覧|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Saitama Prefecture|qq=}} * [[:en:Sakitama Kofun Cluster|Sakitama Kofun Cluster]] == External Links == * {{Cite web|author=Saitama Prefectural Museum of Sakitama|url=https://sakitama-muse.spec.ed.jp/%E5%9F%BC%E7%8E%89%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3%E7%BE%A4%E7%B4%B9%E4%BB%8B/%E5%91%A8%E8%BE%BA%E3%81%AE%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3%E6%A1%88%E5%86%85|title=Guide to Nearby Kofun|work=Saitama Prefecture}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|若小玉古墳群|version=98258662|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Kofun in Saitama Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Gyoda]] [[Category:Kofun clusters]] [[Category:K]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[sn:Wakakodama Kofun Cluster]]}} [[sn:Wakakodama Kofun Cluster]] [[ja:若小玉古墳群]] [[sn:akakodama Kofun Cluster]] [[Category:Kofun of Saitama prefecture]] [[Category:History of Gyoda, Saitama]]

Entrance to the stone chamber of {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} |location=[[:en:Gyōda|Gyōda]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]]; {{ill|Gyoda|qid=Q860659}}|coordinates={{Coord|36|08|34.3|N|139|29|12.6|E|region:JP-08_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=Wakakodama Kofun Cluster}}; {{Coord|36.14286111111111|N|139.48683333333332|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}|map_size=3 [[:en:Zenpokoenfun|Zenpokoenfun]] (keyhole-shaped kofun), 8 {{ill|empun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/empun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (round kofun), and {{ill|hōfun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/hōfun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (square kofun) |built= |burial={{ill|Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} and others |Interred_individual=Unknown |burial goods= |Historic Site={{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} and {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} (Prefectural Designation) |map={{location map|Japan Saitama|label=Wakakodama
Kofun Cluster|lat_deg=36|lat_min=08|lat_sec=34.3|lon_deg=139|lon_min=29|lon_sec=12.6|mark=|marksize=8|float=center|border=none|position=bottom|width=200|caption=location in Saitama Prefecture}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|36|08|34.3|N|139|29|12.6|E}}}} |part_of={{ill|Hachiman-yama Kofun|qid=Q11390962}}; {{ill|Jizozuka Kofun|qid=Q11424667}} }} '''Wakakodama Kofun Cluster''' (若小玉古墳群, Wakakodama Kofun Cluster) is a group of [[:en:Kofun|Kofun]] (ancient Kofuns) located in [[:en:Gyōda|Gyōda]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]], Japan. == Overview == As of the early {{ill|Shōwa period|ja|昭和時代|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōwa period|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 昭和|1=Shōwa era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q327567}}, the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster consisted of three keyhole-shaped tombs ([[:en:Zenpokoenfun|Zenpokoenfun]]), eight round tombs ({{ill|empun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/empun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}), and several square tombs ({{ill|hōfun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/hōfun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}), including prominent examples such as Atagoyama Kofun and Kojinyama Kofun. While most of the kofun have been leveled to make way for the {{ill|Fujimi Industrial Complex|ja|富士見工業団地|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujimi Industrial Complex|qq=}}, {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} and {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} remain intact. The kofun in this cluster are characterized by their dense distribution atop the region's narrow loam plateau, where they coexisted with evidence of residential sites. Notably, the Sanpōzuka Kofun was built directly over a residential site. The construction of the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster is believed to have taken place after the cessation of tomb construction in the [[:en:Sakitama Kofun Cluster|Sakitama Kofun Cluster]], likely reflecting the rise of a new local ruling family.{{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == List of Kofun == * {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} - Round tomb (Prefectural Historic Site); also referred to as "The Stone Stage of the Kanto."{{Cite web|author=Gyoda City Board of Education, Cultural Property Protection Division|url=https://www.city.gyoda.lg.jp/41/03/10/bunkazai_itiran/hatimanyamakofunsekisitu.html|title=Hachiman-yama Kofun Stone Chamber|work=Gyoda City|date=2015-11-02|accessdate=2020-07-16}} * {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} - Square tomb (Prefectural Historic Site) * Atagoyama Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb * Kojinyama Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb : Total length: 74 meters; construction era: early 6th century * Sasazuka Kofun - Round tomb * Sanpōzuka Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb : Total length: approximately 70 meters; features a tategata moats and external protrusions.{{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * Kusen-zuka Kofun - Round tomb * Yoroizuka Kofun - Round tomb Three additional unnamed tombs are present in the area. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * {{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|List of kofun in Japan|ja|Infobox ancient site一覧|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Japan|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|List of kofun in Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県の古墳一覧|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Saitama Prefecture|qq=|1=List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426533}} * [[:en:Sakitama Kofun Cluster|Sakitama Kofun Cluster]] == External Links == * {{Cite web|author=Saitama Prefectural Museum of Sakitama|url=https://sakitama-muse.spec.ed.jp/%E5%9F%BC%E7%8E%89%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3%E7%BE%A4%E7%B4%B9%E4%BB%8B/%E5%91%A8%E8%BE%BA%E3%81%AE%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3%E6%A1%88%E5%86%85|title=Guide to Nearby Kofun|work=Saitama Prefecture}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|若小玉古墳群|version=98258662|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun clusters]] [[Category:K]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] }} [[ja:若小玉古墳群]] [[Category:Kofun of Saitama prefecture]] {{wikidata link|Q11616287}}
