Entrance to the stone chamber of {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} |location=[[:en:Gyōda|Gyōda]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]]; {{ill|Gyoda|WD=Q860659}}|coordinates={{Coord|36|08|34.3|N|139|29|12.6|E|region:JP-08_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=Wakakodama Kofun Cluster}}; {{Coord|36.14286111111111|N|139.48683333333332|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}|map_size=3 [[:en:Zenpokoenfun|Zenpokoenfun]] (keyhole-shaped kofun), 8 {{ill|empun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/empun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (round kofun), and {{ill|hōfun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/hōfun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (square kofun) |built= |burial={{ill|Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} and others |Interred_individual=Unknown |burial goods= |Historic Site={{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} and {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} (Prefectural Designation) |map={{location map|Japan Saitama|label=Wakakodama
Kofun Cluster|lat_deg=36|lat_min=08|lat_sec=34.3|lon_deg=139|lon_min=29|lon_sec=12.6|mark=|marksize=8|float=center|border=none|position=bottom|width=200|caption=location in Saitama Prefecture}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|36|08|34.3|N|139|29|12.6|E}}}} |part_of={{ill|Hachiman-yama Kofun|WD=Q11390962}}; {{ill|Jizozuka Kofun|WD=Q11424667}} }} '''Wakakodama Kofun Cluster''' (若小玉古墳群, Wakakodama Kofun Cluster) is a group of [[:en:Kofun|Kofun]] (ancient Kofuns) located in [[:en:Gyōda|Gyōda]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]], Japan. == Overview == As of the early {{ill|Shōwa period|ja|昭和時代|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōwa period|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 昭和|1=Shōwa era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q327567}}, the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster consisted of three keyhole-shaped tombs ([[:en:Zenpokoenfun|Zenpokoenfun]]), eight round tombs ({{ill|empun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/empun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}), and several square tombs ({{ill|hōfun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/hōfun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}), including prominent examples such as Atagoyama Kofun and Kojinyama Kofun. While most of the kofun have been leveled to make way for the {{ill|Fujimi Industrial Complex|ja|富士見工業団地|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujimi Industrial Complex|qq=}}, {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} and {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} remain intact. The kofun in this cluster are characterized by their dense distribution atop the region's narrow loam plateau, where they coexisted with evidence of residential sites. Notably, the Sanpōzuka Kofun was built directly over a residential site. The construction of the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster is believed to have taken place after the cessation of tomb construction in the [[:en:Sakitama Kofun Cluster|Sakitama Kofun Cluster]], likely reflecting the rise of a new local ruling family.{{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == List of Kofun == * {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} - Round tomb (Prefectural Historic Site); also referred to as "The Stone Stage of the Kanto."{{Cite web|author=Gyoda City Board of Education, Cultural Property Protection Division|url=https://www.city.gyoda.lg.jp/41/03/10/bunkazai_itiran/hatimanyamakofunsekisitu.html|title=Hachiman-yama Kofun Stone Chamber|work=Gyoda City|date=2015-11-02|accessdate=2020-07-16}} * {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} - Square tomb (Prefectural Historic Site) * Atagoyama Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb * Kojinyama Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb : Total length: 74 meters; construction era: early 6th century * Sasazuka Kofun - Round tomb * Sanpōzuka Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb : Total length: approximately 70 meters; features a tategata moats and external protrusions.{{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * Kusen-zuka Kofun - Round tomb * Yoroizuka Kofun - Round tomb Three additional unnamed tombs are present in the area. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * {{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|List of kofun in Japan|ja|Infobox ancient site一覧|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Japan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|List of kofun in Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県の古墳一覧|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Saitama Prefecture|1=List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426533}} * [[:en:Sakitama Kofun Cluster|Sakitama Kofun Cluster]] == External Links == * {{Cite web|author=Saitama Prefectural Museum of Sakitama|url=https://sakitama-muse.spec.ed.jp/%E5%9F%BC%E7%8E%89%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3%E7%BE%A4%E7%B4%B9%E4%BB%8B/%E5%91%A8%E8%BE%BA%E3%81%AE%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3%E6%A1%88%E5%86%85|title=Guide to Nearby Kofun|work=Saitama Prefecture}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|若小玉古墳群|version=98258662|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun clusters]] [[Category:K]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] }} [[ja:若小玉古墳群]] [[Category:Kofun of Saitama prefecture]] {{wikidata link|Q11616287}}

Kofun Cluster|lat_deg=36|lat_min=08|lat_sec=34.3|lon_deg=139|lon_min=29|lon_sec=12.6|mark=|marksize=8|float=center|border=none|position=bottom|width=200|caption=location in Saitama Prefecture}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|36|08|34.3|N|139|29|12.6|E}}}} |part_of={{ill|Hachiman-yama Kofun|WD=Q11390962}}; {{ill|Jizozuka Kofun|WD=Q11424667}} }} '''Wakakodama Kofun Cluster''' (若小玉古墳群, Wakakodama Kofun Cluster) is a group of [[:en:Kofun|Kofun]] (ancient Kofuns) located in [[:en:Gyōda|Gyōda]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]], Japan. == Overview == As of the early {{ill|Shōwa period|ja|昭和時代|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōwa period|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 昭和|1=Shōwa era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q327567}}, the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster consisted of three keyhole-shaped tombs ([[:en:Zenpokoenfun|Zenpokoenfun]]), eight round tombs ({{ill|empun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/empun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}), and several square tombs ({{ill|hōfun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/hōfun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}), including prominent examples such as Atagoyama Kofun and Kojinyama Kofun. While most of the kofun have been leveled to make way for the {{ill|Fujimi Industrial Complex|ja|富士見工業団地|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujimi Industrial Complex|qq=}}, {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} and {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} remain intact. The kofun in this cluster are characterized by their dense distribution atop the region's narrow loam plateau, where they coexisted with evidence of residential sites. Notably, the Sanpōzuka Kofun was built directly over a residential site. The construction of the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster is believed to have taken place after the cessation of tomb construction in the [[:en:Sakitama Kofun Cluster|Sakitama Kofun Cluster]], likely reflecting the rise of a new local ruling family.{{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == List of Kofun == * {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} - Round tomb (Prefectural Historic Site); also referred to as "The Stone Stage of the Kanto."{{Cite web|author=Gyoda City Board of Education, Cultural Property Protection Division|url=https://www.city.gyoda.lg.jp/41/03/10/bunkazai_itiran/hatimanyamakofunsekisitu.html|title=Hachiman-yama Kofun Stone Chamber|work=Gyoda City|date=2015-11-02|accessdate=2020-07-16}} * {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} - Square tomb (Prefectural Historic Site) * Atagoyama Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb * Kojinyama Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb : Total length: 74 meters; construction era: early 6th century * Sasazuka Kofun - Round tomb * Sanpōzuka Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb : Total length: approximately 70 meters; features a tategata moats and external protrusions.{{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * Kusen-zuka Kofun - Round tomb * Yoroizuka Kofun - Round tomb Three additional unnamed tombs are present in the area. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * {{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|List of kofun in Japan|ja|Infobox ancient site一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Japan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|List of kofun in Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Saitama Prefecture|1=List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426533}} * [[:en:Sakitama Kofun Cluster|Sakitama Kofun Cluster]] == External Links == * {{Cite web|author=Saitama Prefectural Museum of Sakitama|url=https://sakitama-muse.spec.ed.jp/%E5%9F%BC%E7%8E%89%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3%E7%BE%A4%E7%B4%B9%E4%BB%8B/%E5%91%A8%E8%BE%BA%E3%81%AE%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3%E6%A1%88%E5%86%85|title=Guide to Nearby Kofun|work=Saitama Prefecture}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|若小玉古墳群|version=98258662|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun clusters]] [[Category:K]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] }} [[ja:若小玉古墳群]] [[Category:Kofun of Saitama prefecture]] {{wikidata link|Q11616287}}

While most of the kofun have been leveled to make way for the {{ill|Fujimi Industrial Complex|ja|富士見工業団地|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujimi Industrial Complex|qq=}}, {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} and {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} remain intact. The kofun in this cluster are characterized by their dense distribution atop the region's narrow loam plateau, where they coexisted with evidence of residential sites. Notably, the Sanpōzuka Kofun was built directly over a residential site. The construction of the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster is believed to have taken place after the cessation of tomb construction in the [[:en:Sakitama Kofun Cluster|Sakitama Kofun Cluster]], likely reflecting the rise of a new local ruling family.{{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == List of Kofun == * {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} - Round tomb (Prefectural Historic Site); construction era: early 6th century * Sasazuka Kofun - Round tomb * Sanpōzuka Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb : Total length: approximately 70 meters; features a tategata moats and external protrusions.{{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * Kusen-zuka Kofun - Round tomb * Yoroizuka Kofun - Round tomb Three additional unnamed tombs are present in the area. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * {{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|List of kofun in Japan|ja|Infobox ancient site一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Japan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|List of kofun in Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Saitama Prefecture|1=List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426533}} * [[:en:Sakitama Kofun Cluster|Sakitama Kofun Cluster]] == External Links == * {{Cite web|author=Saitama Prefectural Museum of Sakitama|url=https://sakitama-muse.spec.ed.jp/%E5%9F%BC%E7%8E%89%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3%E7%BE%A4%E7%B4%B9%E4%BB%8B/%E5%91%A8%E8%BE%BA%E3%81%AE%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3%E6%A1%88%E5%86%85|title=Guide to Nearby Kofun|work=Saitama Prefecture}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|若小玉古墳群|version=98258662|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun clusters]] [[Category:K]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] }} [[ja:若小玉古墳群]] [[Category:Kofun of Saitama prefecture]] {{wikidata link|Q11616287}} [[Category:Wikidata no short description]]

Kofun Cluster|lat_deg=36|lat_min=08|lat_sec=34.3|lon_deg=139|lon_min=29|lon_sec=12.6|mark=|marksize=8|float=center|border=none|position=bottom|width=200|caption=location in Saitama Prefecture}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|36|08|34.3|N|139|29|12.6|E}}}} |part_of={{ill|Hachiman-yama Kofun|WD=Q11390962}}; {{ill|Jizozuka Kofun|WD=Q11424667}} }} '''Wakakodama Kofun Cluster''' (若小玉古墳群, Wakakodama Kofun Cluster) is a group of [[:en:Kofun|Kofun]] (ancient Kofuns) located in [[:en:Gyōda|Gyōda]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]], Japan. == Overview == As of the early {{ill|Shōwa period|ja|昭和時代|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōwa period|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 昭和|1=Shōwa era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q327567}}, the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster consisted of three keyhole-shaped tombs ([[:en:Zenpokoenfun|Zenpokoenfun]]), eight round tombs ({{ill|empun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/empun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}), and several square tombs ({{ill|hōfun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/hōfun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}), including prominent examples such as Atagoyama Kofun and Kojinyama Kofun. While most of the kofun have been leveled to make way for the {{ill|Fujimi Industrial Complex|ja|富士見工業団地|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujimi Industrial Complex|qq=}}, {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} and {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} remain intact. The kofun in this cluster are characterized by their dense distribution atop the region's narrow loam plateau, where they coexisted with evidence of residential sites. Notably, the Sanpōzuka Kofun was built directly over a residential site. The construction of the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster is believed to have taken place after the cessation of tomb construction in the [[:en:Sakitama Kofun Cluster|Sakitama Kofun Cluster]], likely reflecting the rise of a new local ruling family.{{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == List of Kofun == * {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} - Round tomb (Prefectural Historic Site); also referred to as "The Stone Stage of the Kanto."{{Cite web|author=Gyoda City Board of Education, Cultural Property Protection Division|url=https://www.city.gyoda.lg.jp/41/03/10/bunkazai_itiran/hatimanyamakofunsekisitu.html|title=Hachiman-yama Kofun Stone Chamber|work=Gyoda City|date=2015-11-02|accessdate=2020-07-16}} * {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} - Square tomb (Prefectural Historic Site) * Atagoyama Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb * Kojinyama Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb : Total length: 74 meters; construction era: early 6th century * Sasazuka Kofun - Round tomb * Sanpōzuka Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb : Total length: approximately 70 meters; features a tategata moats and external protrusions.{{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * Kusen-zuka Kofun - Round tomb * Yoroizuka Kofun - Round tomb Three additional unnamed tombs are present in the area. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * {{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|List of kofun in Japan|ja|Infobox ancient site一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Japan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|List of kofun in Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Saitama Prefecture|1=List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426533}} * [[:en:Sakitama Kofun Cluster|Sakitama Kofun Cluster]] == External Links == * {{Cite web|author=Saitama Prefectural Museum of Sakitama|url=https://sakitama-muse.spec.ed.jp/%E5%9F%BC%E7%8E%89%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3%E7%BE%A4%E7%B4%B9%E4%BB%8B/%E5%91%A8%E8%BE%BA%E3%81%AE%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3%E6%A1%88%E5%86%85|title=Guide to Nearby Kofun|work=Saitama Prefecture}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|若小玉古墳群|version=98258662|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun clusters]] [[Category:K]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] }} [[ja:若小玉古墳群]] [[Category:Kofun of Saitama prefecture]] {{wikidata link|Q11616287}} [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]]

Notably, the Sanpōzuka Kofun was built directly over a residential site. The construction of the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster is believed to have taken place after the cessation of tomb construction in the [[:en:Sakitama Kofun Cluster|Sakitama Kofun Cluster]], likely reflecting the rise of a new local ruling family.{{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == List of Kofun == * {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} - Round tomb (Prefectural Historic Site); construction era: early 6th century * Sasazuka Kofun - Round tomb * Sanpōzuka Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb : Total length: approximately 70 meters; features a tategata moats and external protrusions.{{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * Kusen-zuka Kofun - Round tomb * Yoroizuka Kofun - Round tomb Three additional unnamed tombs are present in the area. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * {{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|List of kofun in Japan|ja|Infobox ancient site一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Japan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|List of kofun in Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Saitama Prefecture|1=List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426533}} * [[:en:Sakitama Kofun Cluster|Sakitama Kofun Cluster]] == External Links == * {{Cite web|author=Saitama Prefectural Museum of Sakitama|url=https://sakitama-muse.spec.ed.jp/%E5%9F%BC%E7%8E%89%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3%E7%BE%A4%E7%B4%B9%E4%BB%8B/%E5%91%A8%E8%BE%BA%E3%81%AE%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3%E6%A1%88%E5%86%85|title=Guide to Nearby Kofun|work=Saitama Prefecture}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|若小玉古墳群|version=98258662|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun clusters]] [[Category:K]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] }} [[ja:若小玉古墳群]] [[Category:Kofun of Saitama prefecture]] {{wikidata link|Q11616287}} [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]]

Kofun Cluster|lat_deg=36|lat_min=08|lat_sec=34.3|lon_deg=139|lon_min=29|lon_sec=12.6|mark=|marksize=8|float=center|border=none|position=bottom|width=200|caption=location in Saitama Prefecture}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|36|08|34.3|N|139|29|12.6|E}}}} |part_of={{ill|Hachiman-yama Kofun|WD=Q11390962}}; {{ill|Jizozuka Kofun|WD=Q11424667}} }} '''Wakakodama Kofun Cluster''' (若小玉古墳群, Wakakodama Kofun Cluster) is a group of [[:en:Kofun|Kofun]] (ancient Kofuns) located in [[:en:Gyōda|Gyōda]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]], Japan. == Overview == As of the early {{ill|Shōwa period|ja|昭和時代|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōwa period|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 昭和|1=Shōwa era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q327567}}, the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster consisted of three keyhole-shaped tombs ([[:en:Zenpokoenfun|Zenpokoenfun]]), eight round tombs ({{ill|empun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/empun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}), and several square tombs ({{ill|hōfun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/hōfun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}), including prominent examples such as Atagoyama Kofun and Kojinyama Kofun. While most of the kofun have been leveled to make way for the {{ill|Fujimi Industrial Complex|ja|富士見工業団地|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujimi Industrial Complex|qq=}}, {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} and {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} remain intact. The kofun in this cluster are characterized by their dense distribution atop the region's narrow loam plateau, where they coexisted with evidence of residential sites. Notably, the Sanpōzuka Kofun was built directly over a residential site. The construction of the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster is believed to have taken place after the cessation of tomb construction in the [[:en:Sakitama Kofun Cluster|Sakitama Kofun Cluster]], likely reflecting the rise of a new local ruling family.{{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == List of Kofun == * {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} - Round tomb (Prefectural Historic Site); also referred to as "The Stone Stage of the Kanto."{{Cite web|author=Gyoda City Board of Education, Cultural Property Protection Division|url=https://www.city.gyoda.lg.jp/41/03/10/bunkazai_itiran/hatimanyamakofunsekisitu.html|title=Hachiman-yama Kofun Stone Chamber|work=Gyoda City|date=2015-11-02|accessdate=2020-07-16}} * {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} - Square tomb (Prefectural Historic Site) * Atagoyama Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb * Kojinyama Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb : Total length: 74 meters; construction era: early 6th century * Sasazuka Kofun - Round tomb * Sanpōzuka Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb : Total length: approximately 70 meters; features a tategata moats and external protrusions.{{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * Kusen-zuka Kofun - Round tomb * Yoroizuka Kofun - Round tomb Three additional unnamed tombs are present in the area. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * {{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|List of kofun in Japan|ja|Infobox ancient site一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Japan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|List of kofun in Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Saitama Prefecture|1=List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426533}} * [[:en:Sakitama Kofun Cluster|Sakitama Kofun Cluster]] == External Links == * {{Cite web|author=Saitama Prefectural Museum of Sakitama|url=https://sakitama-muse.spec.ed.jp/%E5%9F%BC%E7%8E%89%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3%E7%BE%A4%E7%B4%B9%E4%BB%8B/%E5%91%A8%E8%BE%BA%E3%81%AE%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3%E6%A1%88%E5%86%85|title=Guide to Nearby Kofun|work=Saitama Prefecture}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|若小玉古墳群|version=98258662|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun clusters]] [[Category:K]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] }} [[ja:若小玉古墳群]] [[Category:Kofun of Saitama prefecture]] {{wikidata link|Q11616287}} [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]]

Kofun Cluster|lat_deg=36|lat_min=08|lat_sec=34.3|lon_deg=139|lon_min=29|lon_sec=12.6|mark=|marksize=8|float=center|border=none|position=bottom|width=200|caption=location in Saitama Prefecture}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|36|08|34.3|N|139|29|12.6|E}}}} |part_of={{ill|Hachiman-yama Kofun|WD=Q11390962}}; {{ill|Jizozuka Kofun|WD=Q11424667}} }} '''Wakakodama Kofun Cluster''' (若小玉古墳群, Wakakodama Kofun Cluster) is a group of [[:en:Kofun|Kofun]] (ancient Kofuns) located in [[:en:Gyōda|Gyōda]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]], Japan. == Overview == As of the early {{ill|Shōwa period|ja|昭和時代|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōwa period|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 昭和|1=Shōwa era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q327567}}, the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster consisted of three keyhole-shaped tombs ([[:en:Zenpokoenfun|Zenpokoenfun]]), eight round tombs ({{ill|empun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/empun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}), and several square tombs ({{ill|hōfun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/hōfun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}), including prominent examples such as Atagoyama Kofun and Kojinyama Kofun. While most of the kofun have been leveled to make way for the {{ill|Fujimi Industrial Complex|ja|富士見工業団地|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujimi Industrial Complex|qq=}}, {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} and {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} remain intact. The kofun in this cluster are characterized by their dense distribution atop the region's narrow loam plateau, where they coexisted with evidence of residential sites. Notably, the Sanpōzuka Kofun was built directly over a residential site. The construction of the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster is believed to have taken place after the cessation of tomb construction in the [[:en:Sakitama Kofun Cluster|Sakitama Kofun Cluster]], likely reflecting the rise of a new local ruling family.{{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == List of Kofun == * {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} - Round tomb (Prefectural Historic Site); also referred to as "The Stone Stage of the Kanto."{{Cite web|author=Gyoda City Board of Education, Cultural Property Protection Division|url=https://www.city.gyoda.lg.jp/41/03/10/bunkazai_itiran/hatimanyamakofunsekisitu.html|title=Hachiman-yama Kofun Stone Chamber|work=Gyoda City|date=2015-11-02|accessdate=2020-07-16}} * {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} - Square tomb (Prefectural Historic Site) * Atagoyama Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb * Kojinyama Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb : Total length: 74 meters; construction era: early 6th century * Sasazuka Kofun - Round tomb * Sanpōzuka Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb : Total length: approximately 70 meters; features a tategata moats and external protrusions.{{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * Kusen-zuka Kofun - Round tomb * Yoroizuka Kofun - Round tomb Three additional unnamed tombs are present in the area. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * {{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|List of kofun in Japan|ja|Infobox ancient site一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Japan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|List of kofun in Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Saitama Prefecture|1=List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426533}} * [[:en:Sakitama Kofun Cluster|Sakitama Kofun Cluster]] == External Links == * {{Cite web|author=Saitama Prefectural Museum of Sakitama|url=https://sakitama-muse.spec.ed.jp/%E5%9F%BC%E7%8E%89%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3%E7%BE%A4%E7%B4%B9%E4%BB%8B/%E5%91%A8%E8%BE%BA%E3%81%AE%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3%E6%A1%88%E5%86%85|title=Guide to Nearby Kofun|work=Saitama Prefecture}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|若小玉古墳群|version=98258662|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun clusters]] [[Category:K]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] }} [[ja:若小玉古墳群]] [[Category:Kofun of Saitama prefecture]] {{wikidata link|Q11616287}} [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]]

Entrance to the stone chamber of {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} |location=[[:en:Gyōda|Gyōda]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]]; {{ill|Gyoda|WD=Q860659}}|coordinates={{Coord|36|08|34.3|N|139|29|12.6|E|region:JP-08_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=Wakakodama Kofun Cluster}}; {{Coord|36.14286111111111|N|139.48683333333332|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}|map_size=3 [[:en:Zenpokoenfun|Zenpokoenfun]] (keyhole-shaped kofun), 8 {{ill|empun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/empun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (round kofun), and {{ill|hōfun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/hōfun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (square kofun) |built= |burial={{ill|Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} and others |Interred_individual=Unknown |burial goods= |Historic Site={{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} and {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} (Prefectural Designation) |map={{location map|Japan Saitama|label=Wakakodama
Kofun Cluster|lat_deg=36|lat_min=08|lat_sec=34.3|lon_deg=139|lon_min=29|lon_sec=12.6|mark=|marksize=8|float=center|border=none|position=bottom|width=200|caption=location in Saitama Prefecture}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|36|08|34.3|N|139|29|12.6|E}}}} |part_of={{ill|Hachiman-yama Kofun|WD=Q11390962}}; {{ill|Jizozuka Kofun|WD=Q11424667}} }} '''Wakakodama Kofun Cluster''' (若小玉古墳群, Wakakodama Kofun Cluster) is a group of [[:en:Kofun|Kofun]] (ancient Kofuns) located in [[:en:Gyōda|Gyōda]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]], Japan. == Overview == As of the early {{ill|Shōwa period|ja|昭和時代|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōwa period|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 昭和|1=Shōwa era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q327567}}, the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster consisted of three keyhole-shaped tombs ([[:en:Zenpokoenfun|Zenpokoenfun]]), eight round tombs ({{ill|empun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/empun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}), and several square tombs ({{ill|hōfun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/hōfun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}), including prominent examples such as Atagoyama Kofun and Kojinyama Kofun. While most of the kofun have been leveled to make way for the {{ill|Fujimi Industrial Complex|ja|富士見工業団地|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujimi Industrial Complex|qq=}}, {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} and {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} remain intact. The kofun in this cluster are characterized by their dense distribution atop the region's narrow loam plateau, where they coexisted with evidence of residential sites. Notably, the Sanpōzuka Kofun was built directly over a residential site. The construction of the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster is believed to have taken place after the cessation of tomb construction in the [[:en:Sakitama Kofun Cluster|Sakitama Kofun Cluster]], likely reflecting the rise of a new local ruling family.{{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == List of Kofun == * {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} - Round tomb (Prefectural Historic Site); also referred to as "The Stone Stage of the Kanto."{{Cite web|author=Gyoda City Board of Education, Cultural Property Protection Division|url=https://www.city.gyoda.lg.jp/41/03/10/bunkazai_itiran/hatimanyamakofunsekisitu.html|title=Hachiman-yama Kofun Stone Chamber|work=Gyoda City|date=2015-11-02|accessdate=2020-07-16}} * {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} - Square tomb (Prefectural Historic Site) * Atagoyama Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb * Kojinyama Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb : Total length: 74 meters; construction era: early 6th century * Sasazuka Kofun - Round tomb * Sanpōzuka Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb : Total length: approximately 70 meters; features a tategata moats and external protrusions.{{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * Kusen-zuka Kofun - Round tomb * Yoroizuka Kofun - Round tomb Three additional unnamed tombs are present in the area. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * {{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|List of kofun in Japan|ja|Infobox ancient site一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Japan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|List of kofun in Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Saitama Prefecture|1=List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426533}} * [[:en:Sakitama Kofun Cluster|Sakitama Kofun Cluster]] == External Links == * {{Cite Entrance to the stone chamber of {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} |location=[[:en:Gyōda|Gyōda]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]]; {{ill|Gyoda|WD=Q860659}}|coordinates={{Coord|36|08|34.3|N|139|29|12.6|E|region:JP-08_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=Wakakodama Kofun Cluster}}; {{Coord|36.14286111111111|N|139.48683333333332|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}|map_size=3 [[:en:Zenpokoenfun|Zenpokoenfun]] (keyhole-shaped kofun), 8 {{ill|empun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/empun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (round kofun), and {{ill|hōfun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/hōfun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (square kofun) |built= |burial={{ill|Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} and others |Interred_individual=Unknown |burial goods= |Historic Site={{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} and {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} (Prefectural Designation) |map={{location map|Japan Saitama|label=Wakakodama
Kofun Cluster|lat_deg=36|lat_min=08|lat_sec=34.3|lon_deg=139|lon_min=29|lon_sec=12.6|mark=|marksize=8|float=center|border=none|position=bottom|width=200|caption=location in Saitama Prefecture}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|36|08|34.3|N|139|29|12.6|E}}}} |part_of={{ill|Hachiman-yama Kofun|WD=Q11390962}}; {{ill|Jizozuka Kofun|WD=Q11424667}} }} '''Wakakodama Kofun Cluster''' (若小玉古墳群, Wakakodama Kofun Cluster) is a group of [[:en:Kofun|Kofun]] (ancient Kofuns) located in [[:en:Gyōda|Gyōda]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]], Japan. == Overview == As of the early {{ill|Shōwa period|ja|昭和時代|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōwa period|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 昭和|1=Shōwa era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q327567}}, the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster consisted of three keyhole-shaped tombs ([[:en:Zenpokoenfun|Zenpokoenfun]]), eight round tombs ({{ill|empun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/empun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}), and several square tombs ({{ill|hōfun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/hōfun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}), including prominent examples such as Atagoyama Kofun and Kojinyama Kofun. While most of the kofun have been leveled to make way for the {{ill|Fujimi Industrial Complex|ja|富士見工業団地|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujimi Industrial Complex|qq=}}, {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} and {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} remain intact. The kofun in this cluster are characterized by their dense distribution atop the region's narrow loam plateau, where they coexisted with evidence of residential sites. Notably, the Sanpōzuka Kofun was built directly over a residential site. The construction of the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster is believed to have taken place after the cessation of tomb construction in the [[:en:Sakitama Kofun Cluster|Sakitama Kofun Cluster]], likely reflecting the rise of a new local ruling family.{{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == List of Kofun == * {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} - Round tomb (Prefectural Historic Site); also referred to as "The Stone Stage of the Kanto."{{Cite web|author=Gyoda City Board of Education, Cultural Property Protection Division|url=https://www.city.gyoda.lg.jp/41/03/10/bunkazai_itiran/hatimanyamakofunsekisitu.html|title=Hachiman-yama Kofun Stone Chamber|work=Gyoda City|date=2015-11-02|accessdate=2020-07-16}} * {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} - Square tomb (Prefectural Historic Site) * Atagoyama Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb * Kojinyama Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb : Total length: 74 meters; construction era: early 6th century * Sasazuka Kofun - Round tomb * Sanpōzuka Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb : Total length: approximately 70 meters; features a tategata moats and external protrusions.{{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * Kusen-zuka Kofun - Round tomb * Yoroizuka Kofun - Round tomb Three additional unnamed tombs are present in the area. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * {{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|List of kofun in Japan|ja|Infobox ancient site一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Japan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|List of kofun in Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Saitama Prefecture|1=List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426533}} * [[:en:Sakitama Kofun Cluster|Sakitama Kofun Cluster]] == External Links == * {{Cite web|author=Saitama Prefectural Museum of Sakitama|url=https://sakitama-muse.spec.ed.jp/%E5%9F%BC%E7%8E%89%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3%E7%BE%A4%E7%B4%B9%E4%BB%8B/%E5%91%A8%E8%BE%BA%E3%81%AE%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3%E6%A1%88%E5%86%85|title=Guide to Nearby Kofun|work=Saitama Prefecture}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|若小玉古墳群|version=98258662|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun clusters]] [[Category:K]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] }} [[ja:若小玉古墳群]] [[Category:Kofun of Saitama prefecture]] {{wikidata link|Q11616287}} [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] [[Category:qq]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[Category:qq]] {{wikidata link|Q11616287}} [[Category:qq]][[Category:qq]]

Kofun Cluster|lat_deg=36|lat_min=08|lat_sec=34.3|lon_deg=139|lon_min=29|lon_sec=12.6|mark=|marksize=8|float=center|border=none|position=bottom|width=200|caption=location in Saitama Prefecture}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|36|08|34.3|N|139|29|12.6|E}}}} |part_of={{ill|Hachiman-yama Kofun|WD=Q11390962}}; {{ill|Jizozuka Kofun|WD=Q11424667}} }} '''Wakakodama Kofun Cluster''' (若小玉古墳群, Wakakodama Kofun Cluster) is a group of [[:en:Kofun|Kofun]] (ancient Kofuns) located in [[:en:Gyōda|Gyōda]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]], Japan. == Overview == As of the early {{ill|Shōwa period|ja|昭和時代|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōwa period|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 昭和|1=Shōwa era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q327567}}, the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster consisted of three keyhole-shaped tombs ([[:en:Zenpokoenfun|Zenpokoenfun]]), eight round tombs ({{ill|empun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/empun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}), and several square tombs ({{ill|hōfun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/hōfun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}), including prominent examples such as Atagoyama Kofun and Kojinyama Kofun. While most of the kofun have been leveled to make way for the {{ill|Fujimi Industrial Complex|ja|富士見工業団地|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujimi Industrial Complex|qq=}}, {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} and {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} remain intact. The kofun in this cluster are characterized by their dense distribution atop the region's narrow loam plateau, where they coexisted with evidence of residential sites. Notably, the Sanpōzuka Kofun was built directly over a residential site. The construction of the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster is believed to have taken place after the cessation of tomb construction in the [[:en:Sakitama Kofun Cluster|Sakitama Kofun Cluster]], likely reflecting the rise of a new local ruling family.{{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == List of Kofun == * {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} - Round tomb (Prefectural Historic Site); also referred to as "The Stone Stage of the Kanto."{{Cite web|author=Gyoda City Board of Education, Cultural Property Protection Division|url=https://www.city.gyoda.lg.jp/41/03/10/bunkazai_itiran/hatimanyamakofunsekisitu.html|title=Hachiman-yama Kofun Stone Chamber|work=Gyoda City|date=2015-11-02|accessdate=2020-07-16}} * {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} - Square tomb (Prefectural Historic Site) * Atagoyama Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb * Kojinyama Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb : Total length: 74 meters; construction era: early 6th century * Sasazuka Kofun - Round tomb * Sanpōzuka Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb : Total length: approximately 70 meters; features a tategata moats and external protrusions.{{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * Kusen-zuka Kofun - Round tomb * Yoroizuka Kofun - Round tomb Three additional unnamed tombs are present in the area. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * {{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|List of kofun in Japan|ja|Infobox ancient site一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Japan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|List of kofun in Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Saitama Prefecture|1=List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426533}} * [[:en:Sakitama Kofun Cluster|Sakitama Kofun Cluster]] == External Links == * {{Cite web|author=Saitama Prefectural Museum of Sakitama|url=https://sakitama-muse.spec.ed.jp/%E5%9F%BC%E7%8E%89%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3%E7%BE%A4%E7%B4%B9%E4%BB%8B/%E5%91%A8%E8%BE%BA%E3%81%AE%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3%E6%A1%88%E5%86%85|title=Guide to Nearby Kofun|work=Saitama Prefecture}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|若小玉古墳群|version=98258662|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun clusters]] [[Category:K]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] }} [[ja:若小玉古墳群]] [[Category:Kofun of Saitama prefecture]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] {{wikidata link|Q11616287}}

Kofun Cluster|lat_deg=36|lat_min=08|lat_sec=34.3|lon_deg=139|lon_min=29|lon_sec=12.6|mark=|marksize=8|float=center|border=none|position=bottom|width=200|caption=location in Saitama Prefecture}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|36|08|34.3|N|139|29|12.6|E}}}} |part_of={{ill|Hachiman-yama Kofun|WD=Q11390962}}; {{ill|Jizozuka Kofun|WD=Q11424667}} }} '''Wakakodama Kofun Cluster''' (若小玉古墳群, Wakakodama Kofun Cluster) is a group of [[:en:Kofun|Kofun]] (ancient Kofuns) located in [[:en:Gyōda|Gyōda]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]], Japan. == Overview == As of the early {{ill|Shōwa period|ja|昭和時代|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōwa period|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 昭和|1=Shōwa era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q327567}}, the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster consisted of three keyhole-shaped tombs ([[:en:Zenpokoenfun|Zenpokoenfun]]), eight round tombs ({{ill|empun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/empun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}), and several square tombs ({{ill|hōfun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/hōfun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}), including prominent examples such as Atagoyama Kofun and Kojinyama Kofun. While most of the kofun have been leveled to make way for the {{ill|Fujimi Industrial Complex|ja|富士見工業団地|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujimi Industrial Complex|qq=}}, {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} and {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} remain intact. The kofun in this cluster are characterized by their dense distribution atop the region's narrow loam plateau, where they coexisted with evidence of residential sites. Notably, the Sanpōzuka Kofun was built directly over a residential site. The construction of the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster is believed to have taken place after the cessation of tomb construction in the [[:en:Sakitama Kofun Cluster|Sakitama Kofun Cluster]], likely reflecting the rise of a new local ruling family.{{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == List of Kofun == * {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} - Round tomb (Prefectural Historic Site); also referred to as "The Stone Stage of the Kanto."{{Cite web|author=Gyoda City Board of Education, Cultural Property Protection Division|url=https://www.city.gyoda.lg.jp/41/03/10/bunkazai_itiran/hatimanyamakofunsekisitu.html|title=Hachiman-yama Kofun Stone Chamber|work=Gyoda City|date=2015-11-02|accessdate=2020-07-16}} * {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} - Square tomb (Prefectural Historic Site) * Atagoyama Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb * Kojinyama Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb : Total length: 74 meters; construction era: early 6th century * Sasazuka Kofun - Round tomb * Sanpōzuka Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb : Total length: approximately 70 meters; features a tategata moats and external protrusions.{{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * Kusen-zuka Kofun - Round tomb * Yoroizuka Kofun - Round tomb Three additional unnamed tombs are present in the area. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * {{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|List of kofun in Japan|ja|Infobox ancient site一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Japan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|List of kofun in Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Saitama Prefecture|1=List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426533}} * [[:en:Sakitama Kofun Cluster|Sakitama Kofun Cluster]] == External Links == * {{Cite web|author=Saitama Prefectural Museum of Sakitama|url=https://sakitama-muse.spec.ed.jp/%E5%9F%BC%E7%8E%89%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3%E7%BE%A4%E7%B4%B9%E4%BB%8B/%E5%91%A8%E8%BE%BA%E3%81%AE%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3%E6%A1%88%E5%86%85|title=Guide to Nearby Kofun|work=Saitama Prefecture}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|若小玉古墳群|version=98258662|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun clusters]] [[Category:K]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] }} [[ja:若小玉古墳群]] [[Category:Kofun of Saitama prefecture]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] {{wikidata link|Q11616287}}

The kofun in this cluster are characterized by their dense distribution atop the region's narrow loam plateau, where they coexisted with evidence of residential sites. Notably, the Sanpōzuka Kofun was built directly over a residential site. The construction of the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster is believed to have taken place after the cessation of tomb construction in the [[:en:Sakitama Kofun Cluster|Sakitama Kofun Cluster]], likely reflecting the rise of a new local ruling family.{{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == List of Kofun == * {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} - Round tomb (Prefectural Historic Site); construction era: early 6th century * Sasazuka Kofun - Round tomb * Sanpōzuka Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb : Total length: approximately 70 meters; features a tategata moats and external protrusions.{{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * Kusen-zuka Kofun - Round tomb * Yoroizuka Kofun - Round tomb Three additional unnamed tombs are present in the area. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * {{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|List of kofun in Japan|ja|Infobox ancient site一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Japan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|List of kofun in Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Saitama Prefecture|1=List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426533}} * [[:en:Sakitama Kofun Cluster|Sakitama Kofun Cluster]] == External Links == * {{Cite web|author=Saitama Prefectural Museum of Sakitama|url=https://sakitama-muse.spec.ed.jp/%E5%9F%BC%E7%8E%89%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3%E7%BE%A4%E7%B4%B9%E4%BB%8B/%E5%91%A8%E8%BE%BA%E3%81%AE%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3%E6%A1%88%E5%86%85|title=Guide to Nearby Kofun|work=Saitama Prefecture}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|若小玉古墳群|version=98258662|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun clusters]] [[Category:K]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] }} [[ja:若小玉古墳群]] [[Category:Kofun of Saitama prefecture]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] {{wikidata link|Q11616287}} [[Category:pages with conflicting qids]]

Kofun Cluster|lat_deg=36|lat_min=08|lat_sec=34.3|lon_deg=139|lon_min=29|lon_sec=12.6|mark=|marksize=8|float=center|border=none|position=bottom|width=200|caption=location in Saitama Prefecture}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|36|08|34.3|N|139|29|12.6|E}}}} |part_of={{ill|Hachiman-yama Kofun|WD=Q11390962}}; {{ill|Jizozuka Kofun|WD=Q11424667}} }} '''Wakakodama Kofun Cluster''' (若小玉古墳群, Wakakodama Kofun Cluster) is a group of [[:en:Kofun|Kofun]] (ancient Kofuns) located in [[:en:Gyōda|Gyōda]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]], Japan. == Overview == As of the early {{ill|Shōwa period|ja|昭和時代|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōwa period|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 昭和|1=Shōwa era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q327567}}, the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster consisted of three keyhole-shaped tombs ([[:en:Zenpokoenfun|Zenpokoenfun]]), eight round tombs ({{ill|empun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/empun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}), and several square tombs ({{ill|hōfun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/hōfun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}), including prominent examples such as Atagoyama Kofun and Kojinyama Kofun. While most of the kofun have been leveled to make way for the {{ill|Fujimi Industrial Complex|ja|富士見工業団地|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujimi Industrial Complex|qq=}}, {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} and {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} remain intact. The kofun in this cluster are characterized by their dense distribution atop the region's narrow loam plateau, where they coexisted with evidence of residential sites. Notably, the Sanpōzuka Kofun was built directly over a residential site. The construction of the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster is believed to have taken place after the cessation of tomb construction in the [[:en:Sakitama Kofun Cluster|Sakitama Kofun Cluster]], likely reflecting the rise of a new local ruling family.{{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == List of Kofun == * {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} - Round tomb (Prefectural Historic Site); also referred to as "The Stone Stage of the Kanto."{{Cite web|author=Gyoda City Board of Education, Cultural Property Protection Division|url=https://www.city.gyoda.lg.jp/41/03/10/bunkazai_itiran/hatimanyamakofunsekisitu.html|title=Hachiman-yama Kofun Stone Chamber|work=Gyoda City|date=2015-11-02|accessdate=2020-07-16}} * {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} - Square tomb (Prefectural Historic Site) * Atagoyama Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb * Kojinyama Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb : Total length: 74 meters; construction era: early 6th century * Sasazuka Kofun - Round tomb * Sanpōzuka Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb : Total length: approximately 70 meters; features a tategata moats and external protrusions.{{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * Kusen-zuka Kofun - Round tomb * Yoroizuka Kofun - Round tomb Three additional unnamed tombs are present in the area. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * {{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|List of kofun in Japan|ja|Infobox ancient site一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Japan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|List of kofun in Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Saitama Prefecture|1=List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426533}} * [[:en:Sakitama Kofun Cluster|Sakitama Kofun Cluster]] == External Links == * {{Cite web|author=Saitama Prefectural Museum of Sakitama|url=https://sakitama-muse.spec.ed.jp/%E5%9F%BC%E7%8E%89%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3%E7%BE%A4%E7%B4%B9%E4%BB%8B/%E5%91%A8%E8%BE%BA%E3%81%AE%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3%E6%A1%88%E5%86%85|title=Guide to Nearby Kofun|work=Saitama Prefecture}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|若小玉古墳群|version=98258662|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| }} [[ja:若小玉古墳群]] {{wikidata link|Q11616287}} [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Has wikidata]] [[Category:K]] [[Category:Kofun clusters]] [[Category:Kofun of Saitama prefecture]] [[Category:pages with conflicting qids]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]]

Kofun Cluster|lat_deg=36|lat_min=08|lat_sec=34.3|lon_deg=139|lon_min=29|lon_sec=12.6|mark=|marksize=8|float=center|border=none|position=bottom|width=200|caption=location in Saitama Prefecture}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|36|08|34.3|N|139|29|12.6|E}}}} |part_of={{ill|Hachiman-yama Kofun|WD=Q11390962}}; {{ill|Jizozuka Kofun|WD=Q11424667}} }} '''Wakakodama Kofun Cluster''' (若小玉古墳群, Wakakodama Kofun Cluster) is a group of [[:en:Kofun|Kofun]] (ancient Kofuns) located in [[:en:Gyōda|Gyōda]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]], Japan. == Overview == As of the early {{ill|Shōwa period|ja|昭和時代|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōwa period|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 昭和|1=Shōwa era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q327567}}, the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster consisted of three keyhole-shaped tombs ([[:en:Zenpokoenfun|Zenpokoenfun]]), eight round tombs ({{ill|empun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/empun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}), and several square tombs ({{ill|hōfun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/hōfun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}), including prominent examples such as Atagoyama Kofun and Kojinyama Kofun. While most of the kofun have been leveled to make way for the {{ill|Fujimi Industrial Complex|ja|富士見工業団地|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujimi Industrial Complex|qq=}}, {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} and {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} remain intact. The kofun in this cluster are characterized by their dense distribution atop the region's narrow loam plateau, where they coexisted with evidence of residential sites. Notably, the Sanpōzuka Kofun was built directly over a residential site. The construction of the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster is believed to have taken place after the cessation of tomb construction in the [[:en:Sakitama Kofun Cluster|Sakitama Kofun Cluster]], likely reflecting the rise of a new local ruling family.{{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == List of Kofun == * {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} - Round tomb (Prefectural Historic Site); also referred to as "The Stone Stage of the Kanto."{{Cite web|author=Gyoda City Board of Education, Cultural Property Protection Division|url=https://www.city.gyoda.lg.jp/41/03/10/bunkazai_itiran/hatimanyamakofunsekisitu.html|title=Hachiman-yama Kofun Stone Chamber|work=Gyoda City|date=2015-11-02|accessdate=2020-07-16}} * {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} - Square tomb (Prefectural Historic Site) * Atagoyama Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb * Kojinyama Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb : Total length: 74 meters; construction era: early 6th century * Sasazuka Kofun - Round tomb * Sanpōzuka Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb : Total length: approximately 70 meters; features a tategata moats and external protrusions.{{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * Kusen-zuka Kofun - Round tomb * Yoroizuka Kofun - Round tomb Three additional unnamed tombs are present in the area. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * {{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|List of kofun in Japan|ja|Infobox ancient site一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Japan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|List of kofun in Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Saitama Prefecture|1=List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426533}} * [[:en:Sakitama Kofun Cluster|Sakitama Kofun Cluster]] == External Links == * {{Cite web|author=Saitama Prefectural Museum of Sakitama|url=https://sakitama-muse.spec.ed.jp/%E5%9F%BC%E7%8E%89%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3%E7%BE%A4%E7%B4%B9%E4%BB%8B/%E5%91%A8%E8%BE%BA%E3%81%AE%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3%E6%A1%88%E5%86%85|title=Guide to Nearby Kofun|work=Saitama Prefecture}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|若小玉古墳群|version=98258662|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:若小玉古墳群]] {{wikidata link|Q11616287}} [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Has wikidata]] [[Category:K]] [[Category:Kofun clusters]] [[Category:Kofun of Saitama prefecture]] [[Category:pages with conflicting qids]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]]

The kofun in this cluster are characterized by their dense distribution atop the region's narrow loam plateau, where they coexisted with evidence of residential sites. Notably, the Sanpōzuka Kofun was built directly over a residential site. The construction of the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster is believed to have taken place after the cessation of tomb construction in the [[:en:Sakitama Kofun Cluster|Sakitama Kofun Cluster]], likely reflecting the rise of a new local ruling family.{{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == List of Kofun == * {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} - Round tomb (Prefectural Historic Site); Entrance to the stone chamber of {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} |location=[[:en:Gyōda|Gyōda]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]]; {{ill|Gyoda|WD=Q860659}}|coordinates={{Coord|36|08|34.3|N|139|29|12.6|E|region:JP-08_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=Wakakodama Kofun Cluster}}; {{Coord|36.14286111111111|N|139.48683333333332|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}|map_size=3 [[:en:Zenpokoenfun|Zenpokoenfun]] (keyhole-shaped kofun), 8 {{ill|empun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/empun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (round kofun), and {{ill|hōfun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/hōfun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (square kofun) |built= |burial={{ill|Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} and others |Interred_individual=Unknown |burial goods= |Historic Site={{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} and {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} (Prefectural Designation) |map={{location map|Japan Saitama|label=Wakakodama
Kofun Cluster|lat_deg=36|lat_min=08|lat_sec=34.3|lon_deg=139|lon_min=29|lon_sec=12.6|mark=|marksize=8|float=center|border=none|position=bottom|width=200|caption=location in Saitama Prefecture}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|36|08|34.3|N|139|29|12.6|E}}}} |part_of={{ill|Hachiman-yama Kofun|WD=Q11390962}}; {{ill|Jizozuka Kofun|WD=Q11424667}} }} '''Wakakodama Kofun Cluster''' (若小玉古墳群, Wakakodama Kofun Cluster) is a group of [[:en:Kofun|Kofun]] (ancient Kofuns) located in [[:en:Gyōda|Gyōda]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]], Japan. == Overview == As of the early {{ill|Shōwa period|ja|昭和時代|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōwa period|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 昭和|1=Shōwa era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q327567}}, the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster consisted of three keyhole-shaped tombs ([[:en:Zenpokoenfun|Zenpokoenfun]]), eight round tombs ({{ill|empun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/empun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}), and several square tombs ({{ill|hōfun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/hōfun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}), including prominent examples such as Atagoyama Kofun and Kojinyama Kofun. While most of the kofun have been leveled to make way for the {{ill|Fujimi Industrial Complex|ja|富士見工業団地|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujimi Industrial Complex|qq=}}, {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} and {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} remain intact. The kofun in this cluster are characterized by their dense distribution atop the region's narrow loam plateau, where they coexisted with evidence of residential sites. Notably, the Sanpōzuka Kofun was built directly over a residential site. The construction of the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster is believed to have taken place after the cessation of tomb construction in the [[:en:Sakitama Kofun Cluster|Sakitama Kofun Cluster]], likely reflecting the rise of a new local ruling family.{{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == List of Kofun == * {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} - Round tomb (Prefectural Historic Site); also referred to as "The Stone Stage of the Kanto."{{Cite web|author=Gyoda City Board of Education, Cultural Property Protection Division|url=https://www.city.gyoda.lg.jp/41/03/10/bunkazai_itiran/hatimanyamakofunsekisitu.html|title=Hachiman-yama Kofun Stone Chamber|work=Gyoda City|date=2015-11-02|accessdate=2020-07-16}} * {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} - Square tomb (Prefectural Historic Site) * Atagoyama Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb * Kojinyama Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb : Total length: 74 meters; construction era: early 6th century * Sasazuka Kofun - Round tomb * Sanpōzuka Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb : Total length: approximately 70 meters; features a tategata moats and external protrusions.{{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * Kusen-zuka Kofun - Round tomb * Yoroizuka Kofun - Round tomb Three additional unnamed tombs are present in the area. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * {{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|List of kofun in Japan|ja|Infobox ancient site一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Japan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|List of kofun in Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Saitama Prefecture|1=List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426533}} * [[:en:Sakitama Kofun Cluster|Sakitama Kofun Cluster]] == External Links == * {{Cite web|author=Saitama Prefectural Museum of Sakitama|url=https://sakitama-muse.spec.ed.jp/%E5%9F%BC%E7%8E%89%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3%E7%BE%A4%E7%B4%B9%E4%BB%8B/%E5%91%A8%E8%BE%BA%E3%81%AE%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3%E6%A1%88%E5%86%85|title=Guide to Nearby Kofun|work=Saitama Prefecture}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|若小玉古墳群|version=98258662|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:若小玉古墳群]] {{wikidata link|Q11616287}} [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Has wikidata]] [[Category:K]] [[Category:Kofun clusters]] [[Category:Kofun of Saitama prefecture]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]]

Kofun Cluster|lat_deg=36|lat_min=08|lat_sec=34.3|lon_deg=139|lon_min=29|lon_sec=12.6|mark=|marksize=8|float=center|border=none|position=bottom|width=200|caption=location in Saitama Prefecture}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|36|08|34.3|N|139|29|12.6|E}}}} |part_of={{ill|Hachiman-yama Kofun|WD=Q11390962}}; {{ill|Jizozuka Kofun|WD=Q11424667}} }} '''Wakakodama Kofun Cluster''' (若小玉古墳群, Wakakodama Kofun Cluster) is a group of [[:en:Kofun|Kofun]] (ancient Kofuns) located in [[:en:Gyōda|Gyōda]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]], Japan. == Overview == As of the early {{ill|Shōwa period|ja|昭和時代|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōwa period|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 昭和|1=Shōwa era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q327567}}, the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster consisted of three keyhole-shaped tombs ([[:en:Zenpokoenfun|Zenpokoenfun]]), eight round tombs ({{ill|empun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/empun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}), and several square tombs ({{ill|hōfun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/hōfun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}), including prominent examples such as Atagoyama Kofun and Kojinyama Kofun.
