The kofun in this cluster are characterized by their dense distribution atop the region's narrow loam plateau, where they coexisted with evidence of residential sites. Notably, the Sanpōzuka Kofun was built directly over a residential site. The construction of the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster is believed to have taken place after the cessation of tomb construction in the [[:en:Sakitama Kofun Cluster|Sakitama Kofun Cluster]], likely reflecting the rise of a new local ruling family.{{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == List of Kofun == * {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} - Round tomb (Prefectural Historic Site); construction era: early 6th century * Sasazuka Kofun - Round tomb * Sanpōzuka Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb : Total length: approximately 70 meters; features a tategata moats and external protrusions.{{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * Kusen-zuka Kofun - Round tomb * Yoroizuka Kofun - Round tomb Three additional unnamed tombs are present in the area. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * {{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|List of kofun in Japan|ja|Infobox ancient site一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Japan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|List of kofun in Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Saitama Prefecture|1=List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426533}} * [[:en:Sakitama Kofun Cluster|Sakitama Kofun Cluster]] == External Links == * {{Cite web|author=Saitama Prefectural Museum of Sakitama|url=https://sakitama-muse.spec.ed.jp/%E5%9F%BC%E7%8E%89%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3%E7%BE%A4%E7%B4%B9%E4%BB%8B/%E5%91%A8%E8%BE%BA%E3%81%AE%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3%E6%A1%88%E5%86%85|title=Guide to Nearby Kofun|work=Saitama Prefecture}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|若小玉古墳群|version=98258662|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:若小玉古墳群]] {{wikidata link|Q11616287}} [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:K]] [[Category:Kofun clusters]] [[Category:Kofun of Saitama prefecture]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]]

This was added through to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site |name=Wakakodama Kofun Cluster |image=[[File:Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda), entrance.JPG|280px]]
Entrance to the stone chamber of {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} |location={{ill|Gyōda|en|Gyōda|WD=Q860659|lt=Gyōda}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|WD=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture}}; {{ill|Gyoda|WD=Q860659}}|coordinates={{Coord|36|08|34.3|N|139|29|12.6|E|region:JP-08_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=Wakakodama Kofun Cluster}}; {{Coord|36.14286111111111|N|139.48683333333332|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}|map_size=3 {{ill|Zenpokoenfun|en|Zenpokoenfun|WD=Q11268718|lt=Zenpokoenfun}} (keyhole-shaped kofun), 8 {{ill|empun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/empun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (round kofun), and {{ill|hōfun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/hōfun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (square kofun) |built= |burial={{ill|Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} and others |Interred_individual=Unknown |burial goods= |Historic Site={{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} and {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} (Prefectural Designation) |map={{location map|Japan Saitama|label=Wakakodama
Kofun Cluster|lat_deg=36|lat_min=08|lat_sec=34.3|lon_deg=139|lon_min=29|lon_sec=12.6|mark=|marksize=8|float=center|border=none|position=bottom|width=200|caption=location in Saitama Prefecture}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|36|08|34.3|N|139|29|12.6|E}}}} |part_of={{ill|Hachiman-yama Kofun|WD=Q11390962}}; {{ill|Jizozuka Kofun|WD=Q11424667}} }} '''Wakakodama Kofun Cluster''' (若小玉古墳群, Wakakodama Kofun Cluster) is a group of {{ill|Kofun|en|Kofun|WD=Q1141225|lt=Kofun}} (ancient Kofuns) located in {{ill|Gyōda|en|Gyōda|WD=Q860659|lt=Gyōda}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|WD=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture}}, Japan. == Overview == As of the early {{ill|Shōwa period|ja|昭和時代|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōwa period|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 昭和|1=Shōwa era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q327567}}, the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster consisted of three keyhole-shaped tombs ({{ill|Zenpokoenfun|en|Zenpokoenfun|WD=Q11268718|lt=Zenpokoenfun}}), eight round tombs ({{ill|empun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/empun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}), and several square tombs ({{ill|hōfun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/hōfun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}), including prominent examples such as Atagoyama Kofun and Kojinyama Kofun. While most of the kofun have been leveled to make way for the {{ill|Fujimi Industrial Complex|ja|富士見工業団地|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujimi Industrial Complex|qq=}}, {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} and {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} remain intact. The kofun in this cluster are characterized by their dense distribution atop the region's narrow loam plateau, where they coexisted with evidence of residential sites. Notably, the Sanpōzuka Kofun was built directly over a residential site. The construction of the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster is believed to have taken place after the cessation of tomb construction in the {{ill|Sakitama Kofun Cluster|en|Sakitama Kofun Cluster|WD=Q2213580|lt=Sakitama Kofun Cluster}}, likely reflecting the rise of a new local ruling family.{{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == List of Kofun == * {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} - Round tomb (Prefectural Historic Site); also referred to as "The Stone Stage of the Kanto."{{Cite web|author=Gyoda City Board of Education, Cultural Property Protection Division|url=https://www.city.gyoda.lg.jp/41/03/10/bunkazai_itiran/hatimanyamakofunsekisitu.html|title=Hachiman-yama Kofun Stone Chamber|work=Gyoda City|date=2015-11-02|accessdate=2020-07-16}} * {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} - Square tomb (Prefectural Historic Site) * Atagoyama Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb * Kojinyama Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb : Total length: 74 meters; construction era: early 6th century * Sasazuka Kofun - Round tomb * Sanpōzuka Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb : Total length: approximately 70 meters; features a tategata moats and external protrusions.{{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * Kusen-zuka Kofun - Round tomb * Yoroizuka Kofun - Round tomb Three additional unnamed tombs are present in the area. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * {{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|List of kofun in Japan|ja|Infobox ancient site一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Japan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|List of kofun in Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Saitama Prefecture|1=List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426533}} * {{ill|Sakitama Kofun Cluster|en|Sakitama Kofun Cluster|WD=Q2213580|lt=Sakitama Kofun Cluster}} == External Links == * {{Cite web|author=Saitama Prefectural Museum of Sakitama|url=https://sakitama-muse.spec.ed.jp/%E5%9F%BC%E7%8E%89%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3%E7%BE%A4%E7%B4%B9%E4%BB%8B/%E5%91%A8%E8%BE%BA%E3%81%AE%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3%E6%A1%88%E5%86%85|title=Guide to Nearby Kofun|work=Saitama Prefecture}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|若小玉古墳群|version=98258662|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:若小玉古墳群]] {{wikidata link|Q11616287}} [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:K]] [[Category:Kofun clusters]] [[Category:Kofun of Saitama prefecture]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]]

So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. While most of the kofun have been leveled to make way for the {{ill|Fujimi Industrial Complex|ja|富士見工業団地|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujimi Industrial Complex|qq=}}, {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} and {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} remain intact. The kofun in this cluster are characterized by their dense distribution atop the region's narrow loam plateau, where they coexisted with evidence of residential sites. Notably, the Sanpōzuka Kofun was built directly over a residential site. The construction of the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster is believed to have taken place after the cessation of tomb construction in the {{ill|Sakitama Kofun Cluster|en|Sakitama Kofun Cluster|WD=Q2213580|lt=Sakitama Kofun Cluster}}, likely reflecting the rise of a new local ruling family.{{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == List of Kofun == * {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} - Round tomb (Prefectural Historic Site); also referred to as "The Stone Stage of the Kanto."{{Cite web|author=Gyoda City Board of Education, Cultural Property Protection Division|url=https://www.city.gyoda.lg.jp/41/03/10/bunkazai_itiran/hatimanyamakofunsekisitu.html|title=Hachiman-yama Kofun Stone Chamber|work=Gyoda City|date=2015-11-02|accessdate=2020-07-16}} * {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} - Square tomb (Prefectural Historic Site) * Atagoyama Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb * Kojinyama Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb : Total length: 74 meters; construction era: early 6th century * Sasazuka Kofun - Round tomb * Sanpōzuka Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb : Total length: approximately 70 meters; features a tategata moats and external protrusions.{{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * Kusen-zuka Kofun - Round tomb * Yoroizuka Kofun - Round tomb Three additional unnamed tombs are present in the area. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * {{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|List of kofun in Japan|ja|Infobox ancient site一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Japan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|List of kofun in Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Saitama Prefecture|1=List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426533}} * {{ill|Sakitama Kofun Cluster|en|Sakitama Kofun Cluster|WD=Q2213580|lt=Sakitama Kofun Cluster}} == External Links == * {{Cite web|author=Saitama Prefectural Museum of Sakitama|url=https://sakitama-muse.spec.ed.jp/%E5%9F%BC%E7%8E%89%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3%E7%BE%A4%E7%B4%B9%E4%BB%8B/%E5%91%A8%E8%BE%BA%E3%81%AE%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3%E6%A1%88%E5%86%85|title=Guide to Nearby Kofun|work=Saitama Prefecture}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|若小玉古墳群|version=98258662|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:若小玉古墳群]] {{wikidata link|Q11616287}} [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:K]] [[Category:Kofun clusters]] [[Category:Kofun of Saitama prefecture]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]]

Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site |name=Wakakodama Kofun Cluster |image=[[File:Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda), entrance.JPG|280px]]
Entrance to the stone chamber of {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} |location={{ill|Gyōda|en|Gyōda|WD=Q860659|lt=Gyōda}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|WD=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture}}; {{ill|Gyoda|WD=Q860659}}|coordinates={{Coord|36|08|34.3|N|139|29|12.6|E|region:JP-08_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=Wakakodama Kofun Cluster}}; {{Coord|36.14286111111111|N|139.48683333333332|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}|map_size=3 {{ill|Zenpokoenfun|en|Zenpokoenfun|WD=Q11268718|lt=Zenpokoenfun}} (keyhole-shaped kofun), 8 {{ill|empun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/empun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (round kofun), and {{ill|hōfun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/hōfun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (square kofun) |built= |burial={{ill|Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} and others |Interred_individual=Unknown |burial goods= |Historic Site={{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} and {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} (Prefectural Designation) |map={{location map|Japan Saitama|label=Wakakodama
Kofun Cluster|lat_deg=36|lat_min=08|lat_sec=34.3|lon_deg=139|lon_min=29|lon_sec=12.6|mark=|marksize=8|float=center|border=none|position=bottom|width=200|caption=location in Saitama Prefecture}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|36|08|34.3|N|139|29|12.6|E}}}} |part_of={{ill|Hachiman-yama Kofun|WD=Q11390962}}; {{ill|Jizozuka Kofun|WD=Q11424667}} }} '''Wakakodama Kofun Cluster''' (若小玉古墳群, Wakakodama Kofun Cluster) is a group of {{ill|Kofun|en|Kofun|WD=Q1141225|lt=Kofun}} (ancient Kofuns) located in {{ill|Gyōda|en|Gyōda|WD=Q860659|lt=Gyōda}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|WD=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture}}, Japan. == Overview == As of the early {{ill|Shōwa period|ja|昭和時代|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōwa period|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 昭和|1=Shōwa era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q327567}}, the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster consisted of three keyhole-shaped tombs ({{ill|Zenpokoenfun|en|Zenpokoenfun|WD=Q11268718|lt=Zenpokoenfun}}), eight round tombs ({{ill|empun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/empun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}), and several square tombs ({{ill|hōfun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/hōfun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}), including prominent examples such as Atagoyama Kofun and Kojinyama Kofun. While most of the kofun have been leveled to make way for the {{ill|Fujimi Industrial Complex|ja|富士見工業団地|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujimi Industrial Complex|qq=}}, {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} and {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} remain intact. The kofun in this cluster are characterized by their dense distribution atop the region's narrow loam plateau, where they coexisted with evidence of residential sites. Notably, the Sanpōzuka Kofun was built directly over a residential site. The construction of the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster is believed to have taken place after the cessation of tomb construction in the {{ill|Sakitama Kofun Cluster|en|Sakitama Kofun Cluster|WD=Q2213580|lt=Sakitama Kofun Cluster}}, likely reflecting the rise of a new local ruling family.{{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == List of Kofun == * {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} - Round tomb (Prefectural Historic Site); also referred to as "The Stone Stage of the Kanto."{{Cite web|author=Gyoda City Board of Education, Cultural Property Protection Division|url=https://www.city.gyoda.lg.jp/41/03/10/bunkazai_itiran/hatimanyamakofunsekisitu.html|title=Hachiman-yama Kofun Stone Chamber|work=Gyoda City|date=2015-11-02|accessdate=2020-07-16}} * {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} - Square tomb (Prefectural Historic Site) * Atagoyama Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb * Kojinyama Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb : Total length: 74 meters; construction era: early 6th century * Sasazuka Kofun - Round tomb * Sanpōzuka Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb : Total length: approximately 70 meters; features a tategata moats and external protrusions.{{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * Kusen-zuka Kofun - Round tomb * Yoroizuka Kofun - Round tomb Three additional unnamed tombs are present in the area. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * {{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|List of kofun in Japan|ja|Infobox ancient site一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Japan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|List of kofun in Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Saitama Prefecture|1=List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426533}} * {{ill|Sakitama Kofun Cluster|en|Sakitama Kofun Cluster|WD=Q2213580|lt=Sakitama Kofun Cluster}} == External Links == * {{Cite web|author=Saitama Prefectural Museum of Sakitama|url=https://sakitama-muse.spec.ed.jp/%E5%9F%BC%E7%8E%89%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3%E7%BE%A4%E7%B4%B9%E4%BB%8B/%E5%91%A8%E8%BE%BA%E3%81%AE%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3%E6%A1%88%E5%86%85|title=Guide to Nearby Kofun|work=Saitama Prefecture}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|若小玉古墳群|version=98258662|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:若小玉古墳群]] {{wikidata link|Q11616287}} [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:K]] [[Category:Kofun clusters]] [[Category:Kofun of Saitama prefecture]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]]

Kofun Cluster|lat_deg=36|lat_min=08|lat_sec=34.3|lon_deg=139|lon_min=29|lon_sec=12.6|mark=|marksize=8|float=center|border=none|position=bottom|width=200|caption=location in Saitama Prefecture}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|36|08|34.3|N|139|29|12.6|E}}}} |part_of={{ill|Hachiman-yama Kofun|WD=Q11390962}}; {{ill|Jizozuka Kofun|WD=Q11424667}} }} '''Wakakodama Kofun Cluster''' (若小玉古墳群, Wakakodama Kofun Cluster) is a group of {{ill|Kofun|en|Kofun|WD=Q1141225|lt=Kofun}} (ancient Kofuns) located in {{ill|Gyōda|en|Gyōda|WD=Q860659|lt=Gyōda}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|WD=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture}}, Japan. == Overview == As of the early {{ill|Shōwa period|ja|昭和時代|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōwa period|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 昭和|1=Shōwa era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q327567}}, the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster consisted of three keyhole-shaped tombs ({{ill|Zenpokoenfun|en|Zenpokoenfun|WD=Q11268718|lt=Zenpokoenfun}}), eight round tombs ({{ill|empun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/empun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}), and several square tombs ({{ill|hōfun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/hōfun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}), including prominent examples such as Atagoyama Kofun and Kojinyama Kofun. While most of the kofun have been leveled to make way for the {{ill|Fujimi Industrial Complex|ja|富士見工業団地|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujimi Industrial Complex|qq=}}, {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} and {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} remain intact. The kofun in this cluster are characterized by their dense distribution atop the region's narrow loam plateau, where they coexisted with evidence of residential sites. Notably, the Sanpōzuka Kofun was built directly over a residential site. The construction of the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster is believed to have taken place after the cessation of tomb construction in the {{ill|Sakitama Kofun Cluster|en|Sakitama Kofun Cluster|WD=Q2213580|lt=Sakitama Kofun Cluster}}, likely reflecting the rise of a new local ruling family.{{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == List of Kofun == * {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} - Round tomb (Prefectural Historic Site); also referred to as "The Stone Stage of the Kanto."{{Cite web|author=Gyoda City Board of Education, Cultural Property Protection Division|url=https://www.city.gyoda.lg.jp/41/03/10/bunkazai_itiran/hatimanyamakofunsekisitu.html|title=Hachiman-yama Kofun Stone Chamber|work=Gyoda City|date=2015-11-02|accessdate=2020-07-16}} * {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} - Square tomb (Prefectural Historic Site) * Atagoyama Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb * Kojinyama Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb : Total length: 74 meters; construction era: early 6th century * Sasazuka Kofun - Round tomb * Sanpōzuka Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb : Total length: approximately 70 meters; features a tategata moats and external protrusions.{{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * Kusen-zuka Kofun - Round tomb * Yoroizuka Kofun - Round tomb Three additional unnamed tombs are present in the area. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * {{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|List of kofun in Japan|ja|Infobox ancient site一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Japan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|List of kofun in Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Saitama Prefecture|1=List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426533}} * {{ill|Sakitama Kofun Cluster|en|Sakitama Kofun Cluster|WD=Q2213580|lt=Sakitama Kofun Cluster}} == External Links == * {{Cite web|author=Saitama Prefectural Museum of Sakitama|url=https://sakitama-muse.spec.ed.jp/%E5%9F%BC%E7%8E%89%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3%E7%BE%A4%E7%B4%B9%E4%BB%8B/%E5%91%A8%E8%BE%BA%E3%81%AE%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3%E6%A1%88%E5%86%85|title=Guide to Nearby Kofun|work=Saitama Prefecture}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|若小玉古墳群|version=98258662|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:若小玉古墳群]] {{wikidata link|Q11616287}} [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:K]] [[Category:Kofun clusters]] [[Category:Kofun of Saitama prefecture]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]]

[[ja:若小玉古墳群]] [[ja:若小玉古墳群]] [[ja:若小玉古墳群]] {{Infobox ancient site |name=Wakakodama Kofun Cluster |image=[[File:Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda), entrance.JPG|280px]]
Entrance to the stone chamber of {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} |location={{ill|Gyōda|en|Gyōda|WD=Q860659|lt=Gyōda}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|WD=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture}}; {{ill|Gyoda|WD=Q860659}}|coordinates={{Coord|36|08|34.3|N|139|29|12.6|E|region:JP-08_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=Wakakodama Kofun Cluster}}; {{Coord|36.14286111111111|N|139.48683333333332|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}|map_size=3 {{ill|Zenpokoenfun|en|Zenpokoenfun|WD=Q11268718|lt=Zenpokoenfun}} (keyhole-shaped kofun), 8 {{ill|empun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/empun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (round kofun), and {{ill|hōfun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/hōfun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (square kofun) |built= |burial={{ill|Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} and others |Interred_individual=Unknown |burial goods= |Historic Site={{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} and {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} (Prefectural Designation) |map={{location map|Japan Saitama|label=Wakakodama
Kofun Cluster|lat_deg=36|lat_min=08|lat_sec=34.3|lon_deg=139|lon_min=29|lon_sec=12.6|mark=|marksize=8|float=center|border=none|position=bottom|width=200|caption=location in Saitama Prefecture}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|36|08|34.3|N|139|29|12.6|E}}}} |part_of={{ill|Hachiman-yama Kofun|WD=Q11390962}}; {{ill|Jizozuka Kofun|WD=Q11424667}} }} '''Wakakodama Kofun Cluster''' (若小玉古墳群, Wakakodama Kofun Cluster) is a group of {{ill|Kofun|en|Kofun|WD=Q1141225|lt=Kofun}} (ancient Kofuns) located in {{ill|Gyōda|en|Gyōda|WD=Q860659|lt=Gyōda}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|WD=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture}}, Japan. == Overview == As of the early {{ill|Shōwa period|ja|昭和時代|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōwa period|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 昭和|1=Shōwa era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q327567}}, the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster consisted of three keyhole-shaped tombs ({{ill|Zenpokoenfun|en|Zenpokoenfun|WD=Q11268718|lt=Zenpokoenfun}}), eight round tombs ({{ill|empun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/empun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}), and several square tombs ({{ill|hōfun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/hōfun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}), including prominent examples such as Atagoyama Kofun and Kojinyama Kofun. While most of the kofun have been leveled to make way for the {{ill|Fujimi Industrial Complex|ja|富士見工業団地|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujimi Industrial Complex|qq=}}, {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} and {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} remain intact. The kofun in this cluster are characterized by their dense distribution atop the region's narrow loam plateau, where they coexisted with evidence of residential sites. Notably, the Sanpōzuka Kofun was built directly over a residential site. The construction of the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster is believed to have taken place after the cessation of tomb construction in the {{ill|Sakitama Kofun Cluster|en|Sakitama Kofun Cluster|WD=Q2213580|lt=Sakitama Kofun Cluster}}, likely reflecting the rise of a new local ruling family.{{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == List of Kofun == * {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} - Round tomb (Prefectural Historic Site); also referred to as "The Stone Stage of the Kanto."{{Cite web|author=Gyoda City Board of Education, Cultural Property Protection Division|url=https://www.city.gyoda.lg.jp/41/03/10/bunkazai_itiran/hatimanyamakofunsekisitu.html|title=Hachiman-yama Kofun Stone Chamber|work=Gyoda City|date=2015-11-02|accessdate=2020-07-16}} * {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} - Square tomb (Prefectural Historic Site) * Atagoyama Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb * Kojinyama Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb : Total length: 74 meters; construction era: early 6th century * Sasazuka Kofun - Round tomb * Sanpōzuka Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb : Total length: approximately 70 meters; features a tategata moats and external protrusions.{{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * Kusen-zuka Kofun - Round tomb * Yoroizuka Kofun - Round tomb Three additional unnamed tombs are present in the area. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * {{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|List of kofun in Japan|ja|Infobox ancient site一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Japan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|List of kofun in Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Saitama Prefecture|1=List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426533}} * {{ill|Sakitama Kofun Cluster|en|Sakitama Kofun Cluster|WD=Q2213580|lt=Sakitama Kofun Cluster}} == External Links == * {{Cite web|author=Saitama Prefectural Museum of Sakitama|url=https://sakitama-muse.spec.ed.jp/%E5%9F%BC%E7%8E%89%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3%E7%BE%A4%E7%B4%B9%E4%BB%8B/%E5%91%A8%E8%BE%BA%E3%81%AE%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3%E6%A1%88%E5%86%85|title=Guide to Nearby Kofun|work=Saitama Prefecture}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|若小玉古墳群|version=98258662|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:若小玉古墳群]] {{wikidata link|Q11616287}} [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:K]] [[Category:Kofun clusters]] [[Category:Kofun of Saitama prefecture]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:pages]]

Kofun Cluster|lat_deg=36|lat_min=08|lat_sec=34.3|lon_deg=139|lon_min=29|lon_sec=12.6|mark=|marksize=8|float=center|border=none|position=bottom|width=200|caption=location in Saitama Prefecture}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|36|08|34.3|N|139|29|12.6|E}}}} |part_of={{ill|Hachiman-yama Kofun|WD=Q11390962|1=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)}}; {{ill|Jizozuka Kofun|WD=Q11424667|1=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)}} }} '''Wakakodama Kofun Cluster''' (若小玉古墳群, Wakakodama Kofun Cluster) is a group of {{ill|Kofun|en|Kofun|WD=Q1141225|lt=Kofun|1=Kofun}} (ancient Kofuns) located in {{ill|Gyōda|en|Gyōda|WD=Q860659|lt=Gyōda|1=Gyōda}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|WD=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture|1=Saitama Prefecture}}, Japan. == Overview == As of the early {{ill|Shōwa period|ja|昭和時代|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōwa period|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 昭和|1=Shōwa era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q327567}}, the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster consisted of three keyhole-shaped tombs ({{ill|Zenpokoenfun|en|Zenpokoenfun|WD=Q11268718|lt=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpōkōenfun}}), eight round tombs ({{ill|empun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/empun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}), and several square tombs ({{ill|hōfun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/hōfun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}), including prominent examples such as Atagoyama Kofun and Kojinyama Kofun. While most of the kofun have been leveled to make way for the {{ill|Fujimi Industrial Complex|ja|富士見工業団地|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujimi Industrial Complex|qq=}}, {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} and {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} remain intact. The kofun in this cluster are characterized by their dense distribution atop the region's narrow loam plateau, where they coexisted with evidence of residential sites. Notably, the Sanpōzuka Kofun was built directly over a residential site. The construction of the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster is believed to have taken place after the cessation of tomb construction in the {{ill|Sakitama Kofun Cluster|en|Sakitama Kofun Cluster|WD=Q2213580|lt=Sakitama Kofun Cluster|1=Sakitama Kofun Cluster}}, likely reflecting the rise of a new local ruling family.{{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == List of Kofun == * {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} - Round tomb (Prefectural Historic Site); also referred to as "The Stone Stage of the Kanto."{{Cite web|author=Gyoda City Board of Education, Cultural Property Protection Division|url=https://www.city.gyoda.lg.jp/41/03/10/bunkazai_itiran/hatimanyamakofunsekisitu.html|title=Hachiman-yama Kofun Stone Chamber|work=Gyoda City|date=2015-11-02|accessdate=2020-07-16}} * {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} - Square tomb (Prefectural Historic Site) * Atagoyama Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb * Kojinyama Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb : Total length: 74 meters; construction era: early 6th century * Sasazuka Kofun - Round tomb * Sanpōzuka Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb : Total length: approximately 70 meters; features a tategata moats and external protrusions.{{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * Kusen-zuka Kofun - Round tomb * Yoroizuka Kofun - Round tomb Three additional unnamed tombs are present in the area. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * {{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|List of kofun in Japan|ja|Infobox ancient site一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Japan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|List of kofun in Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Saitama Prefecture|1=list of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426533}} * {{ill|Sakitama Kofun Cluster|en|Sakitama Kofun Cluster|WD=Q2213580|lt=Sakitama Kofun Cluster|1=Sakitama Kofun Cluster}} == External Links == * {{Cite web|author=Saitama Prefectural Museum of Sakitama|url=https://sakitama-muse.spec.ed.jp/%E5%9F%BC%E7%8E%89%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3%E7%BE%A4%E7%B4%B9%E4%BB%8B/%E5%91%A8%E8%BE%BA%E3%81%AE%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3%E6%A1%88%E5%86%85|title=Guide to Nearby Kofun|work=Saitama Prefecture}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|若小玉古墳群|version=98258662|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:若小玉古墳群]] {{wikidata link|Q11616287}} [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:K]] [[Category:Kofun clusters]] [[Category:Kofun of Saitama prefecture]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:pages]]

[[ja:若小玉古墳群]] [[ja:若小玉古墳群]] [[ja:若小玉古墳群]] {{Infobox ancient site |name=Wakakodama Kofun Cluster |image=[[File:Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda), entrance.JPG|280px]]
Entrance to the stone chamber of {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} |location={{ill|Gyōda|en|Gyōda|WD=Q860659|lt=Gyōda|1=Gyōda}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|WD=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture|1=Saitama Prefecture}}; {{ill|Gyoda|WD=Q860659|1=Gyōda}}|coordinates={{Coord|36|08|34.3|N|139|29|12.6|E|region:JP-08_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=Wakakodama Kofun Cluster}}; {{Coord|36.14286111111111|N|139.48683333333332|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}|map_size=3 {{ill|Zenpokoenfun|en|Zenpokoenfun|WD=Q11268718|lt=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpōkōenfun}} (keyhole-shaped kofun), 8 {{ill|empun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/empun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (round kofun), and {{ill|hōfun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/hōfun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (square kofun) |built= |burial={{ill|Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} and others |Interred_individual=Unknown |burial goods= |Historic Site={{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} and {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} (Prefectural Designation) |map={{location map|Japan Saitama|label=Wakakodama
Kofun Cluster|lat_deg=36|lat_min=08|lat_sec=34.3|lon_deg=139|lon_min=29|lon_sec=12.6|mark=|marksize=8|float=center|border=none|position=bottom|width=200|caption=location in Saitama Prefecture}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|36|08|34.3|N|139|29|12.6|E}}}} |part_of={{ill|Hachiman-yama Kofun|WD=Q11390962|1=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)}}; {{ill|Jizozuka Kofun|WD=Q11424667|1=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)}} }} '''Wakakodama Kofun Cluster''' (若小玉古墳群, Wakakodama Kofun Cluster) is a group of {{ill|Kofun|en|Kofun|WD=Q1141225|lt=Kofun|1=Kofun}} (ancient Kofuns) located in {{ill|Gyōda|en|Gyōda|WD=Q860659|lt=Gyōda|1=Gyōda}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|WD=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture|1=Saitama Prefecture}}, Japan. == Overview == As of the early {{ill|Shōwa period|ja|昭和時代|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōwa period|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 昭和|1=Shōwa era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q327567}}, the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster consisted of three keyhole-shaped tombs ({{ill|Zenpokoenfun|en|Zenpokoenfun|WD=Q11268718|lt=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpōkōenfun}}), eight round tombs ({{ill|empun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/empun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}), and several square tombs ({{ill|hōfun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/hōfun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}), including prominent examples such as Atagoyama Kofun and Kojinyama Kofun. While most of the kofun have been leveled to make way for the {{ill|Fujimi Industrial Complex|ja|富士見工業団地|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujimi Industrial Complex|qq=}}, {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} and {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} remain intact. The kofun in this cluster are characterized by their dense distribution atop the region's narrow loam plateau, where they coexisted with evidence of residential sites. Notably, the Sanpōzuka Kofun was built directly over a residential site. The construction of the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster is believed to have taken place after the cessation of tomb construction in the {{ill|Sakitama Kofun Cluster|en|Sakitama Kofun Cluster|WD=Q2213580|lt=Sakitama Kofun Cluster|1=Sakitama Kofun Cluster}}, likely reflecting the rise of a new local ruling family.{{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == List of Kofun == * {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} - Round tomb (Prefectural Historic Site); also referred to as "The Stone Stage of the Kanto."{{Cite web|author=Gyoda City Board of Education, Cultural Property Protection Division|url=https://www.city.gyoda.lg.jp/41/03/10/bunkazai_itiran/hatimanyamakofunsekisitu.html|title=Hachiman-yama Kofun Stone Chamber|work=Gyoda City|date=2015-11-02|accessdate=2020-07-16}} * {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} - Square tomb (Prefectural Historic Site) * Atagoyama Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb * Kojinyama Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb : Total length: 74 meters; construction era: early 6th century * Sasazuka Kofun - Round tomb * Sanpōzuka Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb : Total length: approximately 70 meters; features a tategata moats and external protrusions.{{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * Kusen-zuka Kofun - Round tomb * Yoroizuka Kofun - Round tomb Three additional unnamed tombs are present in the area. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * {{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|List of kofun in Japan|ja|Infobox ancient site一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Japan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|List of kofun in Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Saitama Prefecture|1=list of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426533}} * {{ill|Sakitama Kofun Cluster|en|Sakitama Kofun Cluster|WD=Q2213580|lt=Sakitama Kofun Cluster|1=Sakitama Kofun Cluster}} == External Links == * {{Cite web|author=Saitama Prefectural Museum of Sakitama|url=https://sakitama-muse.spec.ed.jp/%E5%9F%BC%E7%8E%89%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3%E7%BE%A4%E7%B4%B9%E4%BB%8B/%E5%91%A8%E8%BE%BA%E3%81%AE%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3%E6%A1%88%E5%86%85|title=Guide to Nearby Kofun|work=Saitama Prefecture}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|若小玉古墳群|version=98258662|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:若小玉古墳群]] {{wikidata link|Q11616287}} [[Category:K]] [[Category:Kofun clusters]] [[Category:Kofun of Saitama prefecture]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:pages]]

[[ja:若小玉古墳群]] [[ja:若小玉古墳群]] [[ja:若小玉古墳群]] {{Infobox ancient site |name=Wakakodama Kofun Cluster |image=[[File:Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda), entrance.JPG|280px]]
Entrance to the stone chamber of {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} |location={{ill|Gyōda|en|Gyōda|WD=Q860659|lt=Gyōda|1=Gyōda}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|WD=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture|1=Saitama Prefecture}}; {{ill|Gyoda|WD=Q860659|1=Gyōda}}|coordinates={{Coord|36|08|34.3|N|139|29|12.6|E|region:JP-08_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=Wakakodama Kofun Cluster}}; {{Coord|36.14286111111111|N|139.48683333333332|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}|map_size=3 {{ill|Zenpokoenfun|en|Zenpokoenfun|WD=Q11268718|lt=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpōkōenfun}} (keyhole-shaped kofun), 8 {{ill|empun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/empun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (round kofun), and {{ill|hōfun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/hōfun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (square kofun) |built= |burial={{ill|Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} and others |Interred_individual=Unknown |burial goods= |Historic Site={{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} and {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} (Prefectural Designation) |map={{location map|Japan Saitama|label=Wakakodama
Kofun Cluster|lat_deg=36|lat_min=08|lat_sec=34.3|lon_deg=139|lon_min=29|lon_sec=12.6|mark=|marksize=8|float=center|border=none|position=bottom|width=200|caption=location in Saitama Prefecture}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|36|08|34.3|N|139|29|12.6|E}}}} |part_of={{ill|Hachiman-yama Kofun|WD=Q11390962|1=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)}}; {{ill|Jizozuka Kofun|WD=Q11424667|1=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)}} }} '''Wakakodama Kofun Cluster''' (若小玉古墳群, Wakakodama Kofun Cluster) is a group of {{ill|Kofun|en|Kofun|WD=Q1141225|lt=Kofun|1=Kofun}} (ancient Kofuns) located in {{ill|Gyōda|en|Gyōda|WD=Q860659|lt=Gyōda|1=Gyōda}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|WD=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture|1=Saitama Prefecture}}, Japan. == Overview == As of the early {{ill|Shōwa period|ja|昭和時代|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōwa period|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 昭和|1=Shōwa era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q327567}}, the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster consisted of three keyhole-shaped tombs ({{ill|Zenpokoenfun|en|Zenpokoenfun|WD=Q11268718|lt=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpōkōenfun}}), eight round tombs ({{ill|empun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/empun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}), and several square tombs ({{ill|hōfun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/hōfun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}), including prominent examples such as Atagoyama Kofun and Kojinyama Kofun. While most of the kofun have been leveled to make way for the {{ill|Fujimi Industrial Complex|ja|富士見工業団地|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujimi Industrial Complex|qq=}}, {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} and {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} remain intact. The kofun in this cluster are characterized by their dense distribution atop the region's narrow loam plateau, where they coexisted with evidence of residential sites. Notably, the Sanpōzuka Kofun was built directly over a residential site. The construction of the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster is believed to have taken place after the cessation of tomb construction in the {{ill|Sakitama Kofun Cluster|en|Sakitama Kofun Cluster|WD=Q2213580|lt=Sakitama Kofun Cluster|1=Sakitama Kofun Cluster}}, likely reflecting the rise of a new local ruling family.{{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == List of Kofun == * {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} - Round tomb (Prefectural Historic Site); also referred to as "The Stone Stage of the Kanto."{{Cite web|author=Gyoda City Board of Education, Cultural Property Protection Division|url=https://www.city.gyoda.lg.jp/41/03/10/bunkazai_itiran/hatimanyamakofunsekisitu.html|title=Hachiman-yama Kofun Stone Chamber|work=Gyoda City|date=2015-11-02|accessdate=2020-07-16}} * {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} - Square tomb (Prefectural Historic Site) * Atagoyama Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb * Kojinyama Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb : Total length: 74 meters; construction era: early 6th century * Sasazuka Kofun - Round tomb * Sanpōzuka Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb : Total length: approximately 70 meters; features a tategata moats and external protrusions.{{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * Kusen-zuka Kofun - Round tomb * Yoroizuka Kofun - Round tomb Three additional unnamed tombs are present in the area. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpokoenfun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * {{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|List of kofun in Japan|ja|Infobox ancient site一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Japan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|List of kofun in Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Saitama Prefecture|1=list of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426533}} * {{ill|Sakitama Kofun Cluster|en|Sakitama Kofun Cluster|WD=Q2213580|lt=Sakitama Kofun Cluster|1=Sakitama Kofun Cluster}} == External Links == * {{Cite web|author=Saitama Prefectural Museum of Sakitama|url=https://sakitama-muse.spec.ed.jp/%E5%9F%BC%E7%8E%89%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3%E7%BE%A4%E7%B4%B9%E4%BB%8B/%E5%91%A8%E8%BE%BA%E3%81%AE%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3%E6%A1%88%E5%86%85|title=Guide to Nearby Kofun|work=Saitama Prefecture}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|若小玉古墳群|version=98258662|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:若小玉古墳群]] {{wikidata link|Q11616287}} [[Category:Kofun clusters]] [[Category:Kofun of Saitama prefecture]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]]

[[ja:若小玉古墳群]] [[ja:若小玉古墳群]] [[ja:若小玉古墳群]] {{Infobox ancient site |name=Wakakodama Kofun Cluster |image=[[File:Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda), entrance.JPG|280px]]
Entrance to the stone chamber of {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} |location={{ill|Gyōda|en|Gyōda|WD=Q860659|lt=Gyōda|1=Gyōda}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|WD=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture|1=Saitama Prefecture}}; {{ill|Gyoda|WD=Q860659|1=Gyōda}}|coordinates={{Coord|36|08|34.3|N|139|29|12.6|E|region:JP-08_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=Wakakodama Kofun Cluster}}; {{Coord|36.14286111111111|N|139.48683333333332|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}|map_size=3 {{ill|Zenpō-kōen-fun|en|Zenpō-kōen-fun|WD=Q11268718|lt=Zenpō-kōen-fun|1=Zenpō-kōen-fun}} (keyhole-shaped kofun), 8 {{ill|empun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/empun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (round kofun), and {{ill|hōfun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/hōfun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (square kofun) |built= |burial={{ill|Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} and others |Interred_individual=Unknown |burial goods= |Historic Site={{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} and {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} (Prefectural Designation) |map={{location map|Japan Saitama|label=Wakakodama
Kofun Cluster|lat_deg=36|lat_min=08|lat_sec=34.3|lon_deg=139|lon_min=29|lon_sec=12.6|mark=|marksize=8|float=center|border=none|position=bottom|width=200|caption=location in Saitama Prefecture}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|36|08|34.3|N|139|29|12.6|E}}}} |part_of={{ill|Hachiman-yama Kofun|WD=Q11390962|1=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)}}; {{ill|Jizozuka Kofun|WD=Q11424667|1=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)}} }} '''Wakakodama Kofun Cluster''' (若小玉古墳群, Wakakodama Kofun Cluster) is a group of {{ill|Kofun|en|Kofun|WD=Q1141225|lt=Kofun|1=Kofun}} (ancient Kofuns) located in {{ill|Gyōda|en|Gyōda|WD=Q860659|lt=Gyōda|1=Gyōda}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|WD=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture|1=Saitama Prefecture}}, Japan. == Overview == As of the early {{ill|Shōwa period|ja|昭和時代|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōwa period|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 昭和|1=Shōwa era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q327567}}, the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster consisted of three keyhole-shaped tombs ({{ill|Zenpō-kōen-fun|en|Zenpō-kōen-fun|WD=Q11268718|lt=Zenpō-kōen-fun|1=Zenpō-kōen-fun}}), eight round tombs ({{ill|empun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/empun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}), and several square tombs ({{ill|hōfun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/hōfun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}), including prominent examples such as Atagoyama Kofun and Kojinyama Kofun. While most of the kofun have been leveled to make way for the {{ill|Fujimi Industrial Complex|ja|富士見工業団地|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujimi Industrial Complex|qq=}}, {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} and {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} remain intact. The kofun in this cluster are characterized by their dense distribution atop the region's narrow loam plateau, where they coexisted with evidence of residential sites. Notably, the Sanpōzuka Kofun was built directly over a residential site. The construction of the Wakakodama Kofun Cluster is believed to have taken place after the cessation of tomb construction in the {{ill|Sakitama Kofun Cluster|en|Sakitama Kofun Cluster|WD=Q2213580|lt=Sakitama Kofun Cluster|1=Sakitama Kofun Cluster}}, likely reflecting the rise of a new local ruling family.{{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == List of Kofun == * {{ill|Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachimanyama Kofun (Gyoda)|lt=Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|八幡山古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman-yama Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} - Round tomb (Prefectural Historic Site); also referred to as "The Stone Stage of the Kanto."{{Cite web|author=Gyoda City Board of Education, Cultural Property Protection Division|url=https://www.city.gyoda.lg.jp/41/03/10/bunkazai_itiran/hatimanyamakofunsekisitu.html|title=Hachiman-yama Kofun Stone Chamber|work=Gyoda City|date=2015-11-02|accessdate=2020-07-16}} * {{ill|Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyōda)|lt=Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jizōzuka Kofun (Gyoda)|qq=}} - Square tomb (Prefectural Historic Site) * Atagoyama Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb * Kojinyama Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb : Total length: 74 meters; construction era: early 6th century * Sasazuka Kofun - Round tomb * Sanpōzuka Kofun - Keyhole-shaped tomb : Total length: approximately 70 meters; features a tategata moats and external protrusions.{{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpō-kōen-fun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * Kusen-zuka Kofun - Round tomb * Yoroizuka Kofun - Round tomb Three additional unnamed tombs are present in the area. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|author=Wada Harugo|title=Zenpō-kōen-fun Shūsei: Tohoku and Kanto Vol.|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=1994|page=616}} * {{Cite book|last=Tashiro|title=Saitama no Rekishi|publisher=Yamakawa Shu11ansha|year=2010|pages=46–47}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|List of kofun in Japan|ja|Infobox ancient site一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Japan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|List of kofun in Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Saitama Prefecture|1=list of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426533}} * {{ill|Sakitama Kofun Cluster|en|Sakitama Kofun Cluster|WD=Q2213580|lt=Sakitama Kofun Cluster|1=Sakitama Kofun Cluster}} == External Links == * {{Cite web|author=Saitama Prefectural Museum of Sakitama|url=https://sakitama-muse.spec.ed.jp/%E5%9F%BC%E7%8E%89%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3%E7%BE%A4%E7%B4%B9%E4%BB%8B/%E5%91%A8%E8%BE%BA%E3%81%AE%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3%E6%A1%88%E5%86%85|title=Guide to Nearby Kofun|work=Saitama Prefecture}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|若小玉古墳群|version=98258662|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:若小玉古墳群]] {{wikidata link|Q11616287}} [[Category:Kofun clusters]] [[Category:Kofun of Saitama prefecture]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]]
